{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01SQYjefR4zJJm3hBkpShWCY","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→import { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     6→import { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     7→\n     8→export async function GET(\n     9→  _req: NextRequest,\n    10→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    11→) {\n    12→  const { id } = await params;\n    13→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    14→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    16→  }\n    17→\n    18→  const listing = db\n    19→    .prepare(\n    20→      `SELECT\n    21→        l.*,\n    22→        u.display_name as author_name\n    23→      FROM listings l\n    24→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    25→      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    26→    )\n    27→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    28→\n    29→  if (!listing) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const members = db\n    34→    .prepare(\n    35→      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n    36→       FROM listing_members lm\n    37→       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n    38→       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n    39→       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    40→    )\n    41→    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n    42→\n    43→  const session = await getSession();\n    44→  const isMember = session.userId\n    45→    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    46→    : false;\n    47→  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    48→    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    49→    : false;\n    50→\n    51→  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n    52→  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json(\n    54→      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n    55→      { status: 404 }\n    56→    );\n    57→  }\n    58→\n    59→  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n    60→  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n    61→  let hasApplied = false;\n    62→  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n    63→  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    64→    const app = db\n    65→      .prepare(\n    66→        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    67→      )\n    68→      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    69→    if (app) {\n    70→      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n    71→      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    72→    }\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n    76→  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n    77→  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    78→    pendingApplicants = db\n    79→      .prepare(\n    80→        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n    81→         FROM listing_applications la\n    82→         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n    83→         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n    84→         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n    85→      )\n    86→      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n    87→  }\n    88→\n    89→  // Strip sensitive data from the response\n    90→  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n    91→  // Always strip internal platform IDs — these are internal bot/channel identifiers\n    92→  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id;\n    93→  delete safeListingData.discord_channel_id;\n    94→  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    95→    // Strip invite links for non-members\n    96→    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    97→    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n    98→  }\n    99→\n   100→  return NextResponse.json({\n   101→    listing: {\n   102→      ...safeListingData,\n   103→      members,\n   104→      memberCount: members.length,\n   105→      isMember,\n   106→      isAuthor,\n   107→      hasApplied,\n   108→      applicationStatus,\n   109→      pendingApplicants,\n   110→      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n   111→      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n   112→      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n   113→    },\n   114→  });\n   115→}\n   116→\n   117→export async function PATCH(\n   118→  req: NextRequest,\n   119→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   120→) {\n   121→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   122→  if (!session) {\n   123→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   124→  }\n   125→\n   126→  const { id } = await params;\n   127→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   128→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   129→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   130→  }\n   131→\n   132→  const listing = db\n   133→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   134→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   135→\n   136→  if (!listing) {\n   137→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   138→  }\n   139→\n   140→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   141→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   142→  }\n   143→\n   144→  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n   145→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   146→    return NextResponse.json(\n   147→      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   148→      { status: 400 }\n   149→    );\n   150→  }\n   151→\n   152→  try {\n   153→    const body = await req.json();\n   154→    const {\n   155→      language,\n   156→      readingPace,\n   157→      startDate,\n   158→      meetingFormat,\n   159→      maxGroupSize,\n   160→      requiresApproval,\n   161→      platformPreference,\n   162→    } = body;\n   163→\n   164→    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n   165→    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n   166→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   167→    }\n   168→\n   169→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   170→      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n   171→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   172→      }\n   173→      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n   174→      if (startDate < today) {\n   175→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n   176→      }\n   177→    }\n   178→\n   179→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n   180→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n   181→    }\n   182→\n   183→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   184→      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n   185→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n   186→      }\n   187→      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n   188→      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n   189→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n   190→      }\n   191→\n   192→      // Pre-check member count (authoritative check happens inside transaction below)\n   193→      const memberCount = (db\n   194→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   195→        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   196→\n   197→      if (size < memberCount) {\n   198→        return NextResponse.json(\n   199→          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n   200→          { status: 400 }\n   201→        );\n   202→      }\n   203→    }\n   204→\n   205→    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n   206→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   207→    }\n   208→\n   209→    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n   210→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n   211→    }\n   212→\n   213→    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n   214→    const updates: string[] = [];\n   215→    const values: unknown[] = [];\n   216→\n   217→    if (language !== undefined) {\n   218→      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n   219→      values.push(language);\n   220→    }\n   221→    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n   222→      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n   223→      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n   224→    }\n   225→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   226→      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n   227→      values.push(startDate);\n   228→    }\n   229→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n   230→      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n   231→      values.push(meetingFormat);\n   232→    }\n   233→    // Track whether maxGroupSize change needs is_full recalculation\n   234→    let needsIsFullRecalc = false;\n   235→    let parsedNewSize = 0;\n   236→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   237→      parsedNewSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n   238→      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n   239→      values.push(parsedNewSize);\n   240→      needsIsFullRecalc = true;\n   241→    }\n   242→    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n   243→      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n   244→      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n   245→    }\n   246→    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n   247→      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n   248→      values.push(platformPreference);\n   249→    }\n   250→\n   251→    if (updates.length === 0) {\n   252→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n   253→    }\n   254→\n   255→    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n   256→    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   257→      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {\n   258→        // Re-read member count and is_full inside transaction to prevent stale data\n   259→        const fresh = db.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n   260→        const currentMemberCount = (db\n   261→          .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   262→          .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   263→\n   264→        if (parsedNewSize < currentMemberCount) {\n   265→          return { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${currentMemberCount})` };\n   266→        }\n   267→\n   268→        if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {\n   269→          updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n   270→          values.push(0);\n   271→        }\n   272→      }\n   273→\n   274→      values.push(listingId);\n   275→      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n   276→      return null;\n   277→    });\n   278→\n   279→    const txResult = updateTransaction();\n   280→    if (txResult?.error) {\n   281→      return NextResponse.json({ error: txResult.error }, { status: 400 });\n   282→    }\n   283→\n   284→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   285→  } catch (error) {\n   286→    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n   287→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   288→  }\n   289→}\n   290→\n   291→export async function DELETE(\n   292→  _req: NextRequest,\n   293→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   294→) {\n   295→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   296→  if (!session) {\n   297→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   298→  }\n   299→\n   300→  const { id } = await params;\n   301→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   302→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   303→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   304→  }\n   305→\n   306→  const listing = db\n   307→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   308→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   309→\n   310→  if (!listing) {\n   311→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   312→  }\n   313→\n   314→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   315→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   316→  }\n   317→\n   318→  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n   319→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   320→    return NextResponse.json(\n   321→      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   322→      { status: 400 }\n   323→    );\n   324→  }\n   325→\n   326→  try {\n   327→    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n   328→    const members = db\n   329→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n   330→      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   331→\n   332→    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n   333→    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   334→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   335→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   336→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   337→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   338→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   339→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   340→    });\n   341→\n   342→    deleteTransaction();\n   343→\n   344→    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n   345→    for (const member of members) {\n   346→      try {\n   347→        createNotification(\n   348→          member.user_id,\n   349→          null,\n   350→          \"listing_deleted\",\n   351→          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n   352→        );\n   353→      } catch {\n   354→        // Notification failure should not block response\n   355→      }\n   356→    }\n   357→\n   358→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   359→  } catch (error) {\n   360→    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n   361→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   362→  }\n   363→}\n   364→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01VRb8XuH96FMHgWe6LjJa4W","session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"94277913-487a-4b6c-98a3-14ac3e98d5e5","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:01:26.358Z"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01U1xMusF1Q3PS8MDDerHcGc","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     7→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     8→  if (!session) {\n     9→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    10→  }\n    11→\n    12→  // Rate limit: 10 listings per 15 minutes per user\n    13→  const rateLimitKey = `create-listing:${session.userId}`;\n    14→  const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(rateLimitKey, 10);\n    15→  if (!allowed) {\n    16→    return NextResponse.json(\n    17→      { error: \"Too many listings created. Please try again later.\" },\n    18→      { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    19→    );\n    20→  }\n    21→\n    22→  try {\n    23→    const body = await req.json();\n    24→    const {\n    25→      bookTitle,\n    26→      bookAuthor,\n    27→      bookCoverUrl,\n    28→      bookOlid,\n    29→      language,\n    30→      readingPace,\n    31→      startDate,\n    32→      meetingFormat,\n    33→      maxGroupSize,\n    34→      requiresApproval,\n    35→      platformPreference,\n    36→    } = body;\n    37→\n    38→    if (!bookTitle || !bookAuthor || !readingPace || !startDate || !meetingFormat || !maxGroupSize) {\n    39→      return NextResponse.json(\n    40→        { error: \"Missing required fields\" },\n    41→        { status: 400 }\n    42→      );\n    43→    }\n    44→\n    45→    // Type check all string fields to prevent coercion bypasses\n    46→    if (typeof bookTitle !== \"string\" || typeof bookAuthor !== \"string\" ||\n    47→        typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || typeof startDate !== \"string\" ||\n    48→        typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\") {\n    49→      return NextResponse.json(\n    50→        { error: \"Invalid field types\" },\n    51→        { status: 400 }\n    52→      );\n    53→    }\n    54→\n    55→    if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n    56→      return NextResponse.json(\n    57→        { error: \"Invalid group size\" },\n    58→        { status: 400 }\n    59→      );\n    60→    }\n    61→\n    62→    // Input length limits to prevent abuse\n    63→    if (bookTitle.length > 300 || bookAuthor.length > 200 || readingPace.length > 200) {\n    64→      return NextResponse.json(\n    65→        { error: \"One or more fields exceed maximum length\" },\n    66→        { status: 400 }\n    67→      );\n    68→    }\n    69→\n    70→    if (![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    71→      return NextResponse.json(\n    72→        { error: \"Invalid meeting format\" },\n    73→        { status: 400 }\n    74→      );\n    75→    }\n    76→\n    77→    if (!startDate || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n    78→      return NextResponse.json(\n    79→        { error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" },\n    80→        { status: 400 }\n    81→      );\n    82→    }\n    83→\n    84→    const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    85→    if (startDate < today) {\n    86→      return NextResponse.json(\n    87→        { error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" },\n    88→        { status: 400 }\n    89→      );\n    90→    }\n    91→\n    92→    const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n    93→    if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n    94→      return NextResponse.json(\n    95→        { error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" },\n    96→        { status: 400 }\n    97→      );\n    98→    }\n    99→\n   100→    const platform = [\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)\n   101→      ? platformPreference\n   102→      : \"telegram\";\n   103→\n   104→    // Validate book cover URL — only allow Open Library covers to prevent SSRF/tracking\n   105→    const sanitizedCoverUrl =\n   106→      bookCoverUrl && typeof bookCoverUrl === \"string\" &&\n   107→      bookCoverUrl.startsWith(\"https://covers.openlibrary.org/\")\n   108→        ? bookCoverUrl\n   109→        : \"\";\n   110→\n   111→    // Wrap listing creation + auto-join in a transaction for atomicity\n   112→    const createTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   113→      const result = db\n   114→        .prepare(\n   115→          `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, book_cover_url, book_olid, language, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, requires_approval, platform_preference)\n   116→           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n   117→        )\n   118→        .run(\n   119→          session.userId,\n   120→          bookTitle.trim(),\n   121→          bookAuthor.trim(),\n   122→          sanitizedCoverUrl,\n   123→          bookOlid || \"\",\n   124→          language || \"English\",\n   125→          readingPace.trim(),\n   126→          startDate,\n   127→          meetingFormat,\n   128→          size,\n   129→          requiresApproval ? 1 : 0,\n   130→          platform\n   131→        );\n   132→\n   133→      // Auto-join the author as a member\n   134→      db.prepare(\n   135→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n   136→      ).run(result.lastInsertRowid, session.userId);\n   137→\n   138→      return result.lastInsertRowid;\n   139→    });\n   140→\n   141→    const listingId = createTransaction();\n   142→\n   143→    return NextResponse.json(\n   144→      { id: listingId },\n   145→      { status: 201 }\n   146→    );\n   147→  } catch (error) {\n   148→    console.error(\"Create listing error:\", error);\n   149→    return NextResponse.json(\n   150→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n   151→      { status: 500 }\n   152→    );\n   153→  }\n   154→}\n   155→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01VRb8XuH96FMHgWe6LjJa4W","session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"7f76d5b6-6c68-494a-abbb-5269d4c8792c","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:01:26.273Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"abacbd2cccabbeabe","tool_use_id":"toolu_01VRb8XuH96FMHgWe6LjJa4W","description":"Reading app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":25872,"tool_uses":12,"duration_ms":18229},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"cb836c48-a430-413a-9a40-e840e2289e00","session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01CrfhzieswVjG98qmg5NUwz","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_012GfwVZjhkeeMBvEhn7hMoo","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":8702,"cache_read_input_tokens":16783,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":8702,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":37,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01VRb8XuH96FMHgWe6LjJa4W","session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"c03fa96f-5e2c-45fe-afae-dac150a50603"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_012GfwVZjhkeeMBvEhn7hMoo","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function PATCH(\n     7→  req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const body = await req.json();\n    34→  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n    35→\n    36→  if (!applicationId || typeof applicationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(applicationId) || applicationId < 1 || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n    44→  const application = db\n    45→    .prepare(\n    46→      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    47→    )\n    48→    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    49→\n    50→  if (!application) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n    53→      { status: 404 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n    58→\n    59→  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    60→    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    61→    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    62→      // Re-read max_group_size inside transaction to avoid stale data from concurrent PATCH\n    63→      const freshListing = db\n    64→        .prepare(\"SELECT max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    65→        .get(listingId) as { max_group_size: number } | undefined;\n    66→\n    67→      if (!freshListing) {\n    68→        throw new Error(\"Listing not found\");\n    69→      }\n    70→\n    71→      // Check if group is already full\n    72→      const { count } = db\n    73→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    74→        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    75→\n    76→      if (count >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n    77→        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n    78→      }\n    79→\n    80→      // Update application status\n    81→      db.prepare(\n    82→        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    83→      ).run(applicationId);\n    84→\n    85→      // Add to members\n    86→      db.prepare(\n    87→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    88→      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n    89→\n    90→      // Check if group is now full\n    91→      const newCount = count + 1;\n    92→      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n    93→      if (newCount >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n    94→        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    95→\n    96→        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\n    97→        rejectedApps = db\n    98→          .prepare(\n    99→            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n   100→          )\n   101→          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n   102→\n   103→        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\n   104→          db.prepare(\n   105→            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   106→          ).run(app.id);\n   107→        }\n   108→\n   109→        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\n   110→      }\n   111→      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\n   112→    });\n   113→\n   114→    try {\n   115→      const result = approveTransaction();\n   116→\n   117→      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n   118→      try {\n   119→        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n   120→\n   121→        if (result.isFull) {\n   122→          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n   123→          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n   124→            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   125→          }\n   126→        }\n   127→      } catch (notifErr) {\n   128→        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n   129→      }\n   130→\n   131→      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   132→    } catch (err) {\n   133→      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n   134→      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n   135→    }\n   136→  } else {\n   137→    // Reject\n   138→    db.prepare(\n   139→      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   140→    ).run(applicationId);\n   141→\n   142→    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   143→\n   144→    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   145→  }\n   146→}\n   147→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01VRb8XuH96FMHgWe6LjJa4W","session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"0b9df397-788c-4697-b8f9-1f5d880ed291","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:01:29.386Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01CrfhzieswVjG98qmg5NUwz","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01M7xWCDZYmpECEZWHH7CtW1","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":8702,"cache_read_input_tokens":16783,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":8702,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":37,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01VRb8XuH96FMHgWe6LjJa4W","session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"7965cea2-ec3d-4e94-803e-5a5a04c74733"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01M7xWCDZYmpECEZWHH7CtW1","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationReceived } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"You cannot apply to your own listing\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (!listing.requires_approval) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"This group does not require approval. Join directly.\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  if (listing.is_full) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n    45→  }\n    46→\n    47→  // Wrap membership check + application in a transaction to prevent TOCTOU races\n    48→  const applyTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    49→    // Check if already a member\n    50→    const isMember = db\n    51→      .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n    52→      .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    53→\n    54→    if (isMember) {\n    55→      return { error: \"You are already a member\", status: 400 };\n    56→    }\n    57→\n    58→    // Re-check is_full inside transaction\n    59→    const currentListing = db\n    60→      .prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    61→      .get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n    62→\n    63→    if (currentListing?.is_full) {\n    64→      return { error: \"This group is already full\", status: 400 };\n    65→    }\n    66→\n    67→    // Check if already applied (pending)\n    68→    const existingApp = db\n    69→      .prepare(\n    70→        \"SELECT id, status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    71→      )\n    72→      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { id: number; status: string } | undefined;\n    73→\n    74→    if (existingApp) {\n    75→      if (existingApp.status === \"pending\") {\n    76→        return { error: \"You have already applied\", status: 400 };\n    77→      }\n    78→      if (existingApp.status === \"approved\") {\n    79→        return { error: \"You are already approved\", status: 400 };\n    80→      }\n    81→      // If rejected, allow re-application by updating status back to pending\n    82→      db.prepare(\n    83→        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'pending', decided_at = NULL, applied_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    84→      ).run(existingApp.id);\n    85→\n    86→      return { error: null, status: 200 };\n    87→    }\n    88→\n    89→    // Insert new application\n    90→    db.prepare(\n    91→      \"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    92→    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n    93→\n    94→    return { error: null, status: 200 };\n    95→  });\n    96→\n    97→  const result = applyTransaction();\n    98→\n    99→  if (result.error) {\n   100→    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: result.status });\n   101→  }\n   102→\n   103→  // Notify outside transaction (fire-and-forget)\n   104→  notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n   105→\n   106→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   107→}\n   108→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01VRb8XuH96FMHgWe6LjJa4W","session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"85c5e64b-6a09-473c-8f56-1adaf1052f6a","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:01:29.766Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01SYbBT8W9Du4bTNsx4fgiqc","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Rules:\n    12→ * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n    13→ * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n    14→ * - Cannot rate yourself\n    15→ * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n    16→ */\n    17→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    18→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    19→  if (!session) {\n    20→    return NextResponse.json(\n    21→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    22→      { status: 401 }\n    23→    );\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  const body = await req.json();\n    27→  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n    28→\n    29→  if (listingId == null || ratedUserId == null || score == null) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  // Validate listingId and ratedUserId are positive integers\n    37→  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    38→    return NextResponse.json(\n    39→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n    40→      { status: 400 }\n    41→    );\n    42→  }\n    43→\n    44→  if (typeof ratedUserId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(ratedUserId) || ratedUserId < 1) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json(\n    46→      { error: \"Invalid ratedUserId\" },\n    47→      { status: 400 }\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  if (score < 1 || score > 5 || !Number.isInteger(score)) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n    54→      { status: 400 }\n    55→    );\n    56→  }\n    57→\n    58→  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    59→    return NextResponse.json(\n    60→      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n    61→      { status: 400 }\n    62→    );\n    63→  }\n    64→\n    65→  if (comment !== undefined && comment !== null && typeof comment !== \"string\") {\n    66→    return NextResponse.json(\n    67→      { error: \"Comment must be a string\" },\n    68→      { status: 400 }\n    69→    );\n    70→  }\n    71→\n    72→  if (comment && typeof comment === \"string\" && comment.length > 1000) {\n    73→    return NextResponse.json(\n    74→      { error: \"Comment must be at most 1000 characters\" },\n    75→      { status: 400 }\n    76→    );\n    77→  }\n    78→\n    79→  // Verify listing exists and is full\n    80→  const listing = db\n    81→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    82→    .get(listingId) as { id: number; book_title: string; is_full: number } | undefined;\n    83→\n    84→  if (!listing) {\n    85→    return NextResponse.json(\n    86→      { error: \"Listing not found\" },\n    87→      { status: 404 }\n    88→    );\n    89→  }\n    90→\n    91→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    92→    return NextResponse.json(\n    93→      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n    94→      { status: 400 }\n    95→    );\n    96→  }\n    97→\n    98→  // Verify both users are members\n    99→  const raterMember = db\n   100→    .prepare(\n   101→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n   102→    )\n   103→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n   104→\n   105→  if (!raterMember) {\n   106→    return NextResponse.json(\n   107→      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n   108→      { status: 403 }\n   109→    );\n   110→  }\n   111→\n   112→  const ratedMember = db\n   113→    .prepare(\n   114→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n   115→    )\n   116→    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n   117→\n   118→  if (!ratedMember) {\n   119→    return NextResponse.json(\n   120→      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n   121→      { status: 400 }\n   122→    );\n   123→  }\n   124→\n   125→  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n   126→  const existing = db\n   127→    .prepare(\n   128→      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n   129→    )\n   130→    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n   131→\n   132→  if (existing) {\n   133→    db.prepare(\n   134→      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   135→    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n   136→  } else {\n   137→    db.prepare(\n   138→      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n   139→    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n   140→\n   141→    // Notify the rated user\n   142→    createNotification(\n   143→      ratedUserId,\n   144→      listingId,\n   145→      \"rating_received\",\n   146→      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n   147→    );\n   148→  }\n   149→\n   150→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   151→}\n   152→\n   153→/**\n   154→ * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n   155→ *\n   156→ * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n   157→ * plus the members who can still be rated.\n   158→ */\n   159→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n   160→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   161→  if (!session) {\n   162→    return NextResponse.json(\n   163→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n   164→      { status: 401 }\n   165→    );\n   166→  }\n   167→\n   168→  const listingIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n   169→  if (!listingIdParam) {\n   170→    return NextResponse.json(\n   171→      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n   172→      { status: 400 }\n   173→    );\n   174→  }\n   175→  const listingId = parseInt(listingIdParam, 10);\n   176→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   177→    return NextResponse.json(\n   178→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n   179→      { status: 400 }\n   180→    );\n   181→  }\n   182→\n   183→  // Verify the current user is a member of this listing\n   184→  const isMember = db\n   185→    .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n   186→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n   187→  if (!isMember) {\n   188→    return NextResponse.json(\n   189→      { error: \"You are not a member of this group\" },\n   190→      { status: 403 }\n   191→    );\n   192→  }\n   193→\n   194→  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n   195→  const givenRatings = db\n   196→    .prepare(\n   197→      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   198→       FROM ratings r\n   199→       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n   200→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n   201→    )\n   202→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   203→      rated_user_id: number;\n   204→      score: number;\n   205→      comment: string;\n   206→      display_name: string;\n   207→    }[];\n   208→\n   209→  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n   210→  const receivedRatings = db\n   211→    .prepare(\n   212→      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   213→       FROM ratings r\n   214→       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n   215→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n   216→    )\n   217→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   218→      rater_id: number;\n   219→      score: number;\n   220→      comment: string;\n   221→      display_name: string;\n   222→    }[];\n   223→\n   224→  return NextResponse.json({\n   225→    givenRatings,\n   226→    receivedRatings,\n   227→  });\n   228→}\n   229→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01VRb8XuH96FMHgWe6LjJa4W","session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"6b757f82-ff41-4536-8667-02f6f8b0b23d","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:01:29.973Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01LBEUgpqaXrSha2g6fuPMLj","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n    10→\n    11→    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n    12→      return NextResponse.json(\n    13→        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n    14→        { status: 400 }\n    15→      );\n    16→    }\n    17→\n    18→    // Rate limit: 3 registrations per IP per 15 minutes\n    19→    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    20→    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(`register:${ip}`, 3);\n    21→    if (!allowed) {\n    22→      return NextResponse.json(\n    23→        { error: \"Too many registration attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n    24→        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    25→      );\n    26→    }\n    27→\n    28→    if (password.length < 8) {\n    29→      return NextResponse.json(\n    30→        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n    31→        { status: 400 }\n    32→      );\n    33→    }\n    34→\n    35→    // bcrypt only uses the first 72 bytes; cap to prevent DoS via slow hashing\n    36→    if (password.length > 72) {\n    37→      return NextResponse.json(\n    38→        { error: \"Password must be at most 72 characters\" },\n    39→        { status: 400 }\n    40→      );\n    41→    }\n    42→\n    43→    if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    44→      return NextResponse.json(\n    45→        { error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" },\n    46→        { status: 400 }\n    47→      );\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    if (email.length > 254) {\n    51→      return NextResponse.json(\n    52→        { error: \"Email address is too long\" },\n    53→        { status: 400 }\n    54→      );\n    55→    }\n    56→\n    57→    if (!/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(email.trim())) {\n    58→      return NextResponse.json(\n    59→        { error: \"Please provide a valid email address\" },\n    60→        { status: 400 }\n    61→      );\n    62→    }\n    63→\n    64→    // Normalize email before duplicate check (INSERT stores lowercase)\n    65→    const normalizedEmail = email.toLowerCase().trim();\n    66→\n    67→    // Check if email is already taken\n    68→    const existing = db\n    69→      .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    70→      .get(normalizedEmail);\n    71→    if (existing) {\n    72→      return NextResponse.json(\n    73→        { error: \"An account with this email already exists\" },\n    74→        { status: 409 }\n    75→      );\n    76→    }\n    77→\n    78→    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);\n    79→\n    80→    const result = db\n    81→      .prepare(\n    82→        \"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\"\n    83→      )\n    84→      .run(normalizedEmail, passwordHash, displayName.trim());\n    85→\n    86→    // Auto-login after registration\n    87→    const session = await getSession();\n    88→    session.userId = Number(result.lastInsertRowid);\n    89→    session.email = normalizedEmail;\n    90→    session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    91→    await session.save();\n    92→\n    93→    return NextResponse.json(\n    94→      {\n    95→        user: {\n    96→          id: result.lastInsertRowid,\n    97→          email: normalizedEmail,\n    98→          displayName: displayName.trim(),\n    99→        },\n   100→      },\n   101→      { status: 201 }\n   102→    );\n   103→  } catch (error) {\n   104→    console.error(\"Registration error:\", error);\n   105→    return NextResponse.json(\n   106→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n   107→      { status: 500 }\n   108→    );\n   109→  }\n   110→}\n   111→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01VRb8XuH96FMHgWe6LjJa4W","session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"00ea6709-e6c3-4d03-8389-16791de7598a","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:01:34.264Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySm6DVjapzcszQfzgeFPf","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    const { email, password } = await req.json();\n    10→\n    11→    if (!email || !password) {\n    12→      return NextResponse.json(\n    13→        { error: \"Email and password are required\" },\n    14→        { status: 400 }\n    15→      );\n    16→    }\n    17→\n    18→    // Rate limit: 5 login attempts per email+IP per 15 minutes\n    19→    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    20→    const rateLimitKey = `login:${ip}:${email.toLowerCase().trim()}`;\n    21→    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(rateLimitKey, 5);\n    22→    if (!allowed) {\n    23→      return NextResponse.json(\n    24→        { error: \"Too many login attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n    25→        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    26→      );\n    27→    }\n    28→\n    29→    const user = db\n    30→      .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, password_hash, display_name FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    31→      .get(email.toLowerCase().trim()) as\n    32→      | { id: number; email: string; password_hash: string; display_name: string }\n    33→      | undefined;\n    34→\n    35→    if (!user) {\n    36→      return NextResponse.json(\n    37→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    38→        { status: 401 }\n    39→      );\n    40→    }\n    41→\n    42→    const valid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);\n    43→    if (!valid) {\n    44→      return NextResponse.json(\n    45→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    46→        { status: 401 }\n    47→      );\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    const session = await getSession();\n    51→    session.userId = user.id;\n    52→    session.email = user.email;\n    53→    session.displayName = user.display_name;\n    54→    await session.save();\n    55→\n    56→    return NextResponse.json({\n    57→      user: {\n    58→        id: user.id,\n    59→        email: user.email,\n    60→        displayName: user.display_name,\n    61→      },\n    62→    });\n    63→  } catch (error) {\n    64→    console.error(\"Login error:\", error);\n    65→    return NextResponse.json(\n    66→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    67→      { status: 500 }\n    68→    );\n    69→  }\n    70→}\n    71→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01VRb8XuH96FMHgWe6LjJa4W","session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"6265288d-a409-442c-af67-f000392fa179","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:01:34.395Z"}

id: number;\n     9→  display_name: string;\n    10→  bio: string;\n    11→  joined_at: string;\n    12→}\n    13→\n    14→interface Applicant {\n    15→  application_id: number;\n    16→  id: {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_018EL4vzKoaZzhS61E89DDAt","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();\n    12→\n    13→  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n    15→  }\n    16→\n    17→  if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (bio && bio.length > 500) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be at most 500 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    26→    displayName.trim(),\n    27→    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    28→    session.userId\n    29→  );\n    30→\n    31→  // Update session\n    32→  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    33→  await session.save();\n    34→\n    35→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    36→}\n    37→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01VRb8XuH96FMHgWe6LjJa4W","session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"6e26c3d5-7fff-4113-bc6c-9e7b9218dffc","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:01:38.469Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01N52Sm5jmyikWMzYiuDUpEv","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * Simple in-memory rate limiter for auth endpoints.\n     3→ * Uses a sliding window approach keyed by identifier (IP + route).\n     4→ * Not shared across cluster workers — acceptable for SQLite single-process setup.\n     5→ */\n     6→\n     7→interface RateLimitEntry {\n     8→  timestamps: number[];\n     9→}\n    10→\n    11→const store = new Map<string, RateLimitEntry>();\n    12→\n    13→// Clean up expired entries every 5 minutes\n    14→// Guard against multiple intervals on Next.js hot reload\n    15→const CLEANUP_INTERVAL = 5 * 60 * 1000;\n    16→const globalObj = globalThis as unknown as { __rateLimitCleanup?: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> };\n    17→if (!globalObj.__rateLimitCleanup) {\n    18→  globalObj.__rateLimitCleanup = setInterval(() => {\n    19→    const now = Date.now();\n    20→    for (const [key, entry] of store) {\n    21→      entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => now - t < 15 * 60 * 1000);\n    22→      if (entry.timestamps.length === 0) {\n    23→        store.delete(key);\n    24→      }\n    25→    }\n    26→  }, CLEANUP_INTERVAL);\n    27→}\n    28→\n    29→/**\n    30→ * Check if a request should be rate limited.\n    31→ * @param key - Unique identifier (e.g., IP + email for login, IP for register)\n    32→ * @param maxAttempts - Maximum attempts allowed in the window\n    33→ * @param windowMs - Time window in milliseconds (default: 15 minutes)\n    34→ * @returns Object with allowed boolean and retryAfter seconds (0 if allowed)\n    35→ */\n    36→export function checkRateLimit(\n    37→  key: string,\n    38→  maxAttempts: number = 5,\n    39→  windowMs: number = 15 * 60 * 1000\n    40→): { allowed: boolean; retryAfter: number } {\n    41→  const now = Date.now();\n    42→  let entry = store.get(key);\n    43→\n    44→  if (!entry) {\n    45→    // Prevent unbounded memory growth under attack\n    46→    if (store.size > 50_000) {\n    47→      return { allowed: false, retryAfter: 60 };\n    48→    }\n    49→    entry = { timestamps: [] };\n    50→    store.set(key, entry);\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  // Remove expired timestamps\n    54→  entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => now - t < windowMs);\n    55→\n    56→  if (entry.timestamps.length >= maxAttempts) {\n    57→    const oldestInWindow = entry.timestamps[0];\n    58→    const retryAfter = Math.ceil((oldestInWindow + windowMs - now) / 1000);\n    59→    return { allowed: false, retryAfter };\n    60→  }\n    61→\n    62→  entry.timestamps.push(now);\n    63→  return { allowed: true, retryAfter: 0 };\n    64→}\n    65→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01VRb8XuH96FMHgWe6LjJa4W","session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"198725b5-e6d0-4fd0-b586-aadf43e84e7d","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:01:38.785Z"}

finally {\n   188→      setRatingSaving(null);\n   189→    }\n   190→  };\n   191→\n   192→  const handleJoin = async () => {\n   193→    setJoining(true);\n   194→    setError(\"\");\n   195→    try {\n   196→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n   197→      const data = await res.json();\n   198→      if (!res.ok) {\n   199→        if (res.status === 401) {\n   200→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n   201→          return;\n   202→        }\n   203→        setError(data.error);\n   204→        return;\n   205→      }\n   206→      await fetchListing();\n   207→    } catch {\n   208→      setError(\"Failed to join. Please try again.\");\n   209→    } finally {\n   210→      setJoining(false);\n   211→    }\n   212→  };\n   213→\n   214→  const handleApply = async () => {\n   215→    setApplying(true);\n   216→    setError(\"\");\n   217→    try {\n   218→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/apply`, { method: \"POST\" });\n   219→      const data = await res.json();\n   220→      if (!res.ok) {\n   221→        if (res.status === 401) {\n   222→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n   223→          return;\n   224→        }\n   225→        setError(data.error);\n   226→        return;\n   227→      }\n   228→      await fetchListing();\n   229→    } catch {\n   230→      setError(\"Failed to apply. Please try again.\");\n   231→    } finally {\n   232→      setApplying(false);\n   233→    }\n   234→  };\n   235→\n   236→  const handleDecision = async (applicationId: number, action: \"approve\" | \"reject\") => {\n   237→    setDecidingId(applicationId);\n   238→    setError(\"\");\n   239→    try {\n   240→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/applications`, {\n   241→        method: \"PATCH\",\n   242→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   243→        body: JSON.stringify({ applicationId, action }),\n   244→      });\n   245→      const data = await res.json();\n   246→      if (!res.ok) {\n   247→        setError(data.error);\n   248→        return;\n   249→      }"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01VRb8XuH96FMHgWe6LjJa4W","session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"b3b0017f-e6eb-4195-9dbc-3e72fdd493fe","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:01:43.291Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HG2dy6gT7HNdsiZgoETKqw","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    17→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const listing = db\n    21→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    22→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    23→\n    24→  if (!listing) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json(\n    30→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Telegram link\" },\n    31→      { status: 403 }\n    32→    );\n    33→  }\n    34→\n    35→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json(\n    37→      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },\n    38→      { status: 400 }\n    39→    );\n    40→  }\n    41→\n    42→  const { telegramLink } = await req.json();\n    43→\n    44→  if (!telegramLink || !telegramLink.startsWith(\"https://t.me/\") || telegramLink.length > 512) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json(\n    46→      { error: \"Please provide a valid Telegram invite link (https://t.me/..., max 512 characters)\" },\n    47→      { status: 400 }\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    52→    telegramLink.trim(),\n    53→    listingId\n    54→  );\n    55→\n    56→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    57→}\n    58→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01VRb8XuH96FMHgWe6LjJa4W","session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"f4166976-061e-4b3f-8786-bc34f3ec4f0f","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:01:43.697Z"}

Please try again.\");\n   351→    } finally {\n   352→      setAutoDiscordLoading(false);\n   353→    }\n   354→  };\n   355→\n   356→  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n   357→    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n   358→      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n   359→      text: \"Text chat\",\n   360→      mixed: \"Mixed (voice + text)\",\n   361→    };\n   362→    return labels[f] || f;\n   363→  };\n   364→\n   365→  if (loading) {\n   366→    return (\n   367→      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n   368→        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n   369→      </div>\n   370→    );\n   371→  }\n   372→\n   373→  if (fetchError) {\n   374→    return (\n   375→      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   376→        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">Something went wrong</h2>\n   377→        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n   378→          Failed to load this listing. Please try again.\n   379→        </p>\n   380→        <button\n   381→          onClick={() => { setFetchError(false); setLoading(true); fetchListing(); }}\n   382→          className=\"mt-4 px-4 py-2 rounded cursor-pointer\"\n   383→          style={{ background: \"var(--color-accent)\", color: \"white\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   384→        >\n   385→          Retry\n   386→        </button>\n   387→      </div>\n   388→    );\n   389→  }\n   390→\n   391→  if (notAvailable) {\n   392→    return (\n   393→      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   394→        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">This listing is no longer available</h2>\n   395→        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n   396→          This reading group has reached its maximum size and is no longer visible to non-members.\n   397→        </p>\n   398→        <button\n   399→          onClick={() => router.push(\"/\")}\n   400→          className=\"mt-4 px-4 py-2 rounded\"\n   401→          style={{ background: \"var(--color-accent)\", color: \"white\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   402→        >\n   403→          Browse other listings\n   404→        </button>\n   405→      </div>\n   406→    );\n   407→  }\n   408→\n   409→  if (!listing) {\n   410→    return (\n   411→      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   412→        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">Listing not found</h2>\n   413→        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n   414→          This reading group may have been removed.\n   415→        </p>\n   416→      </div>\n   417→    );\n   418→  }\n   419→\n   420→  const spotsLeft = listing.max_group_size - listing.memberCount;\n   421→\n   422→  return (\n   423→    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n   424→      {error && (\n   425→        <div\n   426→          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n   427→          style={{\n   428→            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n   429→            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n   430→            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   431→          }}\n   432→        >\n   433→          {error}\n   434→        </div>\n   435→      )}\n   436→\n   437→      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n   438→        <div className=\"flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 sm:gap-5\">\n   439→          <BookCover\n   440→            src={listing.book_cover_url}\n   441→            alt={listing.book_title}\n   442→            width={96}\n   443→            height={144}\n   444→            className=\"w-20 h-28 sm:w-24 sm:h-36 object-cover rounded-lg shadow-sm\"\n   445→            style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n   446→          />\n   447→\n   448→          <div className=\"flex-1\">\n   449→            <h1 className=\"text-xl sm:text-2xl mb-1\">{listing.book_title}</h1>"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01VRb8XuH96FMHgWe6LjJa4W","session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"bd8cc024-fc41-43bb-80e1-baeaa8097525","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:01:47.230Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01JS2o7CswMuUbxMSPPDLkxU","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured, generateGroupDeepLink } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * GET /api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Returns the Telegram deep link for one-click group creation.\n    10→ * Only available to the listing author when the group is full\n    11→ * and no Telegram link has been set yet.\n    12→ */\n    13→export async function GET(\n    14→  _req: NextRequest,\n    15→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    16→) {\n    17→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    18→  if (!session) {\n    19→    return NextResponse.json(\n    20→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    21→      { status: 401 }\n    22→    );\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json(\n    27→      { error: \"Telegram bot not configured\", botConfigured: false },\n    28→      { status: 404 }\n    29→    );\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  const { id } = await params;\n    33→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    34→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    36→  }\n    37→\n    38→  const listing = db\n    39→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    40→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    41→\n    42→  if (!listing) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json(\n    48→      { error: \"Only the organizer can create the Telegram group\" },\n    49→      { status: 403 }\n    50→    );\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    54→    return NextResponse.json(\n    55→      { error: \"Group must be full before creating a Telegram group\" },\n    56→      { status: 400 }\n    57→    );\n    58→  }\n    59→\n    60→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    61→    return NextResponse.json(\n    62→      { error: \"Telegram link already set\", telegramLink: listing.telegram_link },\n    63→      { status: 400 }\n    64→    );\n    65→  }\n    66→\n    67→  const deepLink = await generateGroupDeepLink(listingId);\n    68→  if (!deepLink) {\n    69→    return NextResponse.json(\n    70→      { error: \"Failed to generate deep link. Check bot configuration.\" },\n    71→      { status: 500 }\n    72→    );\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  return NextResponse.json({\n    76→    deepLink,\n    77→    instructions:\n    78→      \"Click the link to open Telegram and create a group. The bot will automatically generate an invite link for your reading group.\",\n    79→  });\n    80→}\n    81→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01VRb8XuH96FMHgWe6LjJa4W","session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"26b5a7a1-6583-46d8-8fab-15407f25b4c0","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:01:47.732Z"}

  2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured, generateBotInviteUrl } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function GET(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await getSession();\n    11→  if (!session.userId) {\n    12→ return NextResponse.json(\n    20→      { error: \"Discord bot is not configured\" },\n    21→      { status: 503 }\n    22→    );\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  const { id } = await params;\n    26→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    27→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    28→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  const listing = db\n    32→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    33→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    34→\n    35→  if (!listing) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    37→  }\n    38→\n    39→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    40→    return NextResponse.json(\n    41→      { NextResponse.json(\n    48→      { error: \"The group is not full yet\" },\n    49→      { status: 400 }\n    50→    );\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    54→    return NextResponse.json(\n    55→      { error: \"A Discord link has already been set\" },\n    56→      { status: 400 }\n    57→    );\n    58→  }\n    59→\n    60→  const inviteUrl = generateBotInviteUrl(listingId);\n    61→\n    62→  return NextResponse.json({\n    63→    inviteUrl,\n    64→    instructions:\n    65→      \"Click the link to add the Bookmate bot to your Discord {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_015HABmJmm2kX2yqV8KvFhkg","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→\n     4→const PAGE_SIZE = 20;\n     5→\n     6→export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n     7→  const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;\n     8→\n     9→  const q = searchParams.get(\"q\")?.trim() || \"\";\n    10→  const meetingFormat = searchParams.get(\"meeting_format\") || \"\";\n    11→  const readingPace = searchParams.get(\"reading_pace\") || \"\";\n    12→  const startDateFrom = searchParams.get(\"start_date_from\") || \"\";\n    13→  const sort = searchParams.get(\"sort\") || \"newest\";\n    14→  const includePast = searchParams.get(\"include_past\") === \"true\";\n    15→  const pageParam = parseInt(searchParams.get(\"page\") || \"1\", 10);\n    16→  const page = isNaN(pageParam) || pageParam < 1 ? 1 : Math.min(pageParam, 1000);\n    17→\n    18→  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n    19→  const params: (string | number)[] = [];\n    20→\n    21→  // Apply date floor: use the more restrictive of today or startDateFrom\n    22→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    23→  const hasStartDateFilter = startDateFrom && /^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDateFrom);\n    24→\n    25→  if (!includePast) {\n    26→    // Use whichever is later: today or the explicit start_date_from filter\n    27→    const effectiveDate = hasStartDateFilter && startDateFrom > today ? startDateFrom : today;\n    28→    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    29→    params.push(effectiveDate);\n    30→  } else if (hasStartDateFilter) {\n    31→    // includePast is true, but user wants a specific start date floor\n    32→    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    33→    params.push(startDateFrom);\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (q && q.length <= 300) {\n    37→    conditions.push(\"(l.book_title LIKE ? OR l.book_author LIKE ?)\");\n    38→    params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  if (meetingFormat && [\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    42→    conditions.push(\"l.meeting_format = ?\");\n    43→    params.push(meetingFormat);\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (readingPace && readingPace.length <= 200) {\n    47→    conditions.push(\"l.reading_pace LIKE ?\");\n    48→    params.push(`%${readingPace}%`);\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  const whereClause = conditions.join(\" AND \");\n    52→\n    53→  let orderClause = \"l.created_at DESC\";\n    54→  if (sort === \"oldest\") orderClause = \"l.created_at ASC\";\n    55→  else if (sort === \"start_date\") orderClause = \"l.start_date ASC\";\n    56→\n    57→  const offset = (page - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;\n    58→\n    59→  // Get total count for pagination metadata\n    60→  const countResult = db\n    61→    .prepare(\n    62→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM listings l WHERE ${whereClause}`\n    63→    )\n    64→    .get(...params) as { total: number };\n    65→\n    66→  const listings = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT\n    69→        l.*,\n    70→        u.display_name as author_name,\n    71→        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    72→      FROM listings l\n    73→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    74→      WHERE ${whereClause}\n    75→      ORDER BY ${orderClause}\n    76→      LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`\n    77→    )\n    78→    .all(...params, PAGE_SIZE, offset);\n    79→\n    80→  return NextResponse.json({\n    81→    listings,\n    82→    pagination: {\n    83→      page,\n    84→      pageSize: PAGE_SIZE,\n    85→      total: countResult.total,\n    86→      totalPages: Math.ceil(countResult.total / PAGE_SIZE),\n    87→    },\n    88→  });\n    89→}\n    90→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01VRb8XuH96FMHgWe6LjJa4W","session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"c4f302e3-6633-4625-bd50-cb75c9bc5076","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:01:51.363Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01NqTe3DRzkoa9GsHUUn7DiL","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * Telegram Bot API integration for automatic group creation.\n     3→ *\n     4→ * When TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN is set, the system can:\n     5→ * 1. Generate deep links for one-click group creation\n     6→ * 2. Detect when the bot is added to a group (via webhook)\n     7→ * 3. Auto-generate and save invite links\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Flow:\n    10→ * - Author clicks \"Create Telegram Group\" → opens deep link in Telegram\n    11→ * - Telegram prompts author to create a group with the bot\n    12→ * - Bot receives `my_chat_member` update via webhook\n    13→ * - Bot creates an invite link and saves it to the listing\n    14→ */\n    15→\n    16→const BOT_TOKEN = process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\n    17→const TELEGRAM_API = `https://api.telegram.org/bot${BOT_TOKEN}`;\n    18→\n    19→export function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n    20→  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0;\n    21→}\n    22→\n    23→/**\n    24→ * Call the Telegram Bot API.\n    25→ */\n    26→async function callApi<T = unknown>(\n    27→  method: string,\n    28→  params?: Record<string, unknown>\n    29→): Promise<{ ok: boolean; result?: T; description?: string }> {\n    30→  const res = await fetch(`${TELEGRAM_API}/${method}`, {\n    31→    method: \"POST\",\n    32→    headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    33→    body: JSON.stringify(params || {}),\n    34→  });\n    35→  return res.json();\n    36→}\n    37→\n    38→/**\n    39→ * Get bot info (username, id).\n    40→ */\n    41→export async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n    42→  id: number;\n    43→  username: string;\n    44→  first_name: string;\n    45→} | null> {\n    46→  const res = await callApi<{\n    47→    id: number;\n    48→    username: string;\n    49→    first_name: string;\n    50→  }>(\"getMe\");\n    51→  return res.ok ? res.result! : null;\n    52→}\n    53→\n    54→/**\n    55→ * Generate a deep link that opens Telegram and prompts the user\n    56→ * to create a new group with the bot already added.\n    57→ *\n    58→ * Format: https://t.me/BOT_USERNAME?startgroup=listing_LISTING_ID\n    59→ *\n    60→ * When the user creates the group, Telegram adds the bot and\n    61→ * sends a `my_chat_member` update to our webhook.\n    62→ */\n    63→export async function generateGroupDeepLink(\n    64→  listingId: number\n    65→): Promise<string | null> {\n    66→  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n    67→  if (!bot) return null;\n    68→  return `https://t.me/${bot.username}?startgroup=listing_${listingId}`;\n    69→}\n    70→\n    71→/**\n    72→ * Create an invite link for a chat where the bot is an admin.\n    73→ */\n    74→export async function createChatInviteLink(\n    75→  chatId: number | string\n    76→): Promise<string | null> {\n    77→  const res = await callApi<{ invite_link: string }>(\n    78→    \"createChatInviteLink\",\n    79→    {\n    80→      chat_id: chatId,\n    81→      name: \"Bookmate Reading Group\",\n    82→      creates_join_request: false,\n    83→    }\n    84→  );\n    85→  if (res.ok && res.result) {\n    86→    return res.result.invite_link;\n    87→  }\n    88→  return null;\n    89→}\n    90→\n    91→/**\n    92→ * Export the existing invite link for a chat (fallback).\n    93→ */\n    94→export async function exportChatInviteLink(\n    95→  chatId: number | string\n    96→): Promise<string | null> {\n    97→  const res = await callApi<string>(\"exportChatInviteLink\", {\n    98→    chat_id: chatId,\n    99→  });\n   100→  if (res.ok && res.result) {\n   101→    return res.result;\n   102→  }\n   103→  return null;\n   104→}\n   105→\n   106→/**\n   107→ * Escape HTML special characters for Telegram HTML parse mode.\n   108→ * Telegram's HTML parser interprets <, >, &, and \" — all must be escaped\n   109→ * in user-supplied content to prevent message injection.\n   110→ */\n   111→export function escapeHtml(text: string): string {\n   112→  return text\n   113→    .replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\")\n   114→    .replace(/</g, \"&lt;\")\n   115→    .replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\")\n   116→    .replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\");\n   117→}\n   118→\n   119→/**\n   120→ * Send a message to a Telegram chat.\n   121→ */\n   122→export async function sendMessage(\n   123→  chatId: number | string,\n   124→  text: string\n   125→): Promise<boolean> {\n   126→  const res = await callApi(\"sendMessage\", {\n   127→    chat_id: chatId,\n   128→    text,\n   129→    parse_mode: \"HTML\",\n   130→  });\n   131→  return res.ok;\n   132→}\n   133→\n   134→/**\n   135→ * Set up webhook URL for receiving Telegram updates.\n   136→ */\n   137→export async function setWebhook(url: string): Promise<boolean> {\n   138→  const res = await callApi(\"setWebhook\", {\n   139→    url,\n   140→    allowed_updates: [\"my_chat_member\", \"message\"],\n   141→  });\n   142→  return res.ok;\n   143→}\n   144→\n   145→/**\n   146→ * Parse the listing ID from a /start command payload.\n   147→ * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n   148→ */\n   149→export function parseListingIdFromPayload(\n   150→  payload: string\n   151→): number | null {\n   152→  const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n   153→  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n   154→}\n   155→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01VRb8XuH96FMHgWe6LjJa4W","session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"c689432d-d03b-4a81-ba03-1caef3b3cc18","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:01:51.642Z"}
