So when the group fills, the author receives a \"group is full\" notification telling them \"the bot will set up the chat automatically.\"\n\nThis is intentional per the comment on line 125: `\"author needs to know group is full to create the chat\"`. However, the join endpoint at `/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts` lines 110–114 has special logic that skips the `new_member` notification for the author when the group fills, specifically to avoid sending a redundant notification. But `notifyGroupFull` also fires separately (line 111), which sends a second notification to the author for the same event.\n\nThe result is: when the last member joins, the author gets **one** `group_full` notification from `notifyGroupFull` (which includes the author in the members query). This is the intended behavior, but the comment is misleading and the join/notify logic is easy to break. The real problem is that in the approval flow (`applications/route.ts` lines 121–124), `notifyGroupFull` is called AND then `notifyApplicationDecision` for all rejected applicants is called. Meanwhile `notifyGroupFull` already sends to all `listing_members` (including the author). This is correct, but the `group_full` message text says \"The bot will set up automatically\" regardless of whether the author has already set up the Telegram/Discord link manually.\n\n**Specific bug:** In `notifyGroupFull` (line 135–137), the bot-configured check reads from `process.env` at runtime. This is fine. But the message says \"The organizer will share a link soon\" when the bot is not configured — even though for an approval-flow group that just became full, the author might already have a link. Since no link check against the DB is performed here, members receive misleading messaging. This is a UX correctness issue rather than a data integrity bug.\n\n**Confidence drops to 82 — this is a real UX issue but not a data corruption risk.**\n\n---\n\n### 4. `POST /api/listings/[id]/apply` — Re-application After Rejection Does Not Notify the Author\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts`\n**Lines:** 81–86, 103–104\n**Confidence: 85**\n\nWhen a previously-rejected user re-applies (the `existingApp.status === 'rejected'` branch at line 81), the code updates the status back to `'pending'` and returns `{ error: null, status: 200 }`. Execution then falls through to line 103–104 which calls `notifyApplicationReceived`. This part works correctly.\n\nHowever, the `message` field in the application is never updated on re-application. More critically: the `applied_at` timestamp is reset inside the transaction (`applied_at = datetime('now')`), but the original application `id` is retained. This means the organizer's applicant list will show the correct `applied_at` date. This is fine.\n\nThe actual bug is that the `pendingApplicants` query in the GET endpoint (`route.ts` line 78–86 in `/api/listings/[id]/route.ts`) orders by `la.applied_at ASC`. A re-applicant's `applied_at` is updated to now, so they'll correctly appear at the end of the queue. This is correct behavior.\n\n**Re-evaluating: this is not a bug.** Dropping this finding.\n\n---\n\n### 5. `/api/listings/[id]/route.ts` GET — `pendingApplicants` Returned to Author Even When `requires_approval` Is False (After Toggle)\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts`\n**Lines:** 77, 79–86\n**Confidence: 88**\n\nThe `pendingApplicants` query at line 77 is only executed `if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval)`. This correctly gates the expensive query. However, the returned JSON always includes `pendingApplicants` (line 108), and it's initialized to `[]` when not fetched (line 76). This means that if `requires_approval` was `true`, the author approved some applicants, then toggled `requires_approval` back to `false`, any remaining `pending` applications in the DB will never be surfaced to the author in the UI, even though those applicants are in a limbo state (pending status, no way to be decided).\n\nThis is a data consistency issue: `listing_applications` rows can exist with `status = 'pending'` for a listing where `requires_approval = 0`. Those users cannot join directly (the `/join` endpoint blocks them at line 57–68 for having a pending application), and the author never sees them to approve/reject them. The applicant is stuck.\n\n**The join endpoint check at lines 56–68 of `join/route.ts` exacerbates this:** even though `requires_approval` is now `false`, any user with an existing pending application cannot join directly (correct for preventing double-join), but they also cannot re-apply (the `apply` endpoint blocks at line 36: `if (!listing.requires_approval)`), and their application is invisible to the author. They are permanently locked out unless they contact the author out-of-band or the author re-enables `requires_approval`.\n\n**Fix:** When `requires_approval` is toggled from `1` to `0`, auto-reject all pending applications in the same PATCH transaction, or surface pending applications to the author regardless of the current `requires_approval` flag.\n\n---\n\n### 6. Session Data Is Stale After Profile Update — `displayName` in Session Not Validated Against DB Length Limits\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/route.ts`\n**Lines:** 32–33\n**Confidence: 80**\n\nWhen a user updates their profile, the session is updated in-place at line 32–33. The `displayName` in the session is then used as the display name in notification messages (e.g., `join/route.ts` line 113: `session.displayName || \"Someone\"`). This is correct for the current request, but since iron-session cookies are encrypted client-side, a user with an **active old session** will continue to see their old `displayName` in the Navbar until they re-authenticate (iron-session has no server-side revocation).\n\nThis is an expected iron-session limitation and not a bug per se. However, the `requireAuth` function at `session.ts` line 37–43 returns the session as-is without re-validating the user exists in the DB. If a user's account is deleted from the DB while they have an active session, `requireAuth` returns a valid session object and all authenticated endpoints proceed as if the user exists. Subsequent DB queries that require the user to exist will return undefined, but most endpoints don't handle that — they just proceed (e.g., creating a notification for a deleted user would insert a `user_id` that no longer exists in the `users` table, violating the foreign key `FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)` with `PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON`).\n\n**Concrete failure path:** Admin manually deletes a user from the DB. That user's session cookie is still valid. They POST to `/api/listings/create`, which inserts a listing with their deleted `author_id`. SQLite with `foreign_keys = ON` will reject this with a constraint error, which is caught by the catch block and returns a 500. The real issue is the 500 rather than a meaningful \"account not found\" 401. This is a minor operational concern for this app since there's no admin deletion UI, but it's architecturally correct to flag.\n\n**Confidence: 80 — real but low practical impact for this app's current scope.**\n\n---\n\n## Summary\n\n| # | Severity | File | Lines | Issue |\n|---|----------|------|-------|-------|\n| 1 | CRITICAL | `/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts` | 214–275 | PATCH transaction closes over and mutates outer `updates`/`values` arrays — structurally unsafe, breaks on any retry |\n| 2 | CRITICAL | `/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts` | 264–271 | `is_full` never set to `1` when `maxGroupSize` is reduced to exactly equal current member count |\n| 3 | IMPORTANT | `/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts` + `apply/route.ts` | 77, 57–68 | Users with pending applications become permanently locked out when `requires_approval` is toggled off — invisible to author and blocked from direct join |\n| 4 | IMPORTANT | `/lib/session.ts` | 37–43 | `requireAuth` does not re-validate user existence in DB; deleted users with live sessions cause FK-violation 500s instead of 401s |\n\nIssues 1 and 2 are the most actionable. Issue 3 requires a schema/flow decision. Issue 4 is low-priority for this app's current operational model."}],"totalDurationMs":183173,"totalTokens":84001,"totalToolUseCount":50,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":494,"cache_read_input_tokens":80024,"output_tokens":3482,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":494},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01RSBEfwcmtjyoF8imYUfwsR","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→import { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     6→import { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     7→\n     8→export async function GET(\n     9→  _req: NextRequest,\n    10→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    11→) {\n    12→  const { id } = await params;\n    13→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    14→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    16→  }\n    17→\n    18→  const listing = db\n    19→    .prepare(\n    20→      `SELECT\n    21→        l.*,\n    22→        u.display_name as author_name\n    23→      FROM listings l\n    24→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    25→      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    26→    )\n    27→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    28→\n    29→  if (!listing) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const members = db\n    34→    .prepare(\n    35→      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n    36→       FROM listing_members lm\n    37→       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n    38→       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n    39→       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    40→    )\n    41→    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n    42→\n    43→  const session = await getSession();\n    44→  const isMember = session.userId\n    45→    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    46→    : false;\n    47→  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    48→    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    49→    : false;\n    50→\n    51→  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n    52→  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json(\n    54→      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n    55→      { status: 404 }\n    56→    );\n    57→  }\n    58→\n    59→  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n    60→  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n    61→  let hasApplied = false;\n    62→  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n    63→  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    64→    const app = db\n    65→      .prepare(\n    66→        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    67→      )\n    68→      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    69→    if (app) {\n    70→      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n    71→      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    72→    }\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n    76→  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n    77→  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    78→    pendingApplicants = db\n    79→      .prepare(\n    80→        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n    81→         FROM listing_applications la\n    82→         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n    83→         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n    84→         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n    85→      )\n    86→      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n    87→  }\n    88→\n    89→  // Strip sensitive data from the response\n    90→  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n    91→  // Always strip internal platform IDs — these are internal bot/channel identifiers\n    92→  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id;\n    93→  delete safeListingData.discord_channel_id;\n    94→  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    95→    // Strip invite links for non-members\n    96→    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    97→    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n    98→  }\n    99→\n   100→  return NextResponse.json({\n   101→    listing: {\n   102→      ...safeListingData,\n   103→      members,\n   104→      memberCount: members.length,\n   105→      isMember,\n   106→      isAuthor,\n   107→      hasApplied,\n   108→      applicationStatus,\n   109→      pendingApplicants,\n   110→      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n   111→      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n   112→      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n   113→    },\n   114→  });\n   115→}\n   116→\n   117→export async function PATCH(\n   118→  req: NextRequest,\n   119→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   120→) {\n   121→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   122→  if (!session) {\n   123→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   124→  }\n   125→\n   126→  const { id } = await params;\n   127→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   128→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   129→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   130→  }\n   131→\n   132→  const listing = db\n   133→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   134→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   135→\n   136→  if (!listing) {\n   137→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   138→  }\n   139→\n   140→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   141→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   142→  }\n   143→\n   144→  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n   145→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   146→    return NextResponse.json(\n   147→      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   148→      { status: 400 }\n   149→    );\n   150→  }\n   151→\n   152→  try {\n   153→    const body = await req.json();\n   154→    const {\n   155→      language,\n   156→      readingPace,\n   157→      startDate,\n   158→      meetingFormat,\n   159→      maxGroupSize,\n   160→      requiresApproval,\n   161→      platformPreference,\n   162→    } = body;\n   163→\n   164→    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n   165→    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n   166→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   167→    }\n   168→\n   169→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   170→      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n   171→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   172→      }\n   173→      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n   174→      if (startDate < today) {\n   175→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n   176→      }\n   177→    }\n   178→\n   179→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n   180→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n   181→    }\n   182→\n NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n   190→      }\n   191→\n   192→      // Pre-check member count (authoritative check happens inside transaction below)\n   193→      const memberCount = (db\n   194→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   195→        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   196→\n   197→      if (size < memberCount) {\n   198→        return NextResponse.json(\n   199→          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` > 100)) {\n   206→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   207→    }\n   208→\n   209→    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n   210→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n   211→    }\n   212→\n   213→    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n   214→    const updates: string[] = [];\n   215→    const values: unknown[] = [];\n   216→\n   217→    if (language !== undefined) {\n   218→      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n   219→      values.push(language);\n   220→    }\n   221→    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n   222→      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n   223→      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n   224→    }\n   225→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   226→      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n   227→      values.push(startDate);\n   228→    }\n   229→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n   230→      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n   231→      values.push(meetingFormat);\n   232→    }\n   233→    // Track whether maxGroupSize change needs is_full recalculation\n   234→    let needsIsFullRecalc = false;\n   235→    let parsedNewSize = 0;\n   236→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   237→      parsedNewSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n   238→      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n   239→      values.push(parsedNewSize);\n   240→      needsIsFullRecalc = true;\n   241→    }\n   242→    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n   243→      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n   244→      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n   245→    }\n   246→    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n   247→      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n   248→      values.push(platformPreference);\n   249→    }\n   250→\n   251→    if (updates.length === 0) {\n   252→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n   253→    }\n   254→\n   255→    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n   256→    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   257→      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {\n   258→        // Re-read member count and is_full inside transaction to prevent stale data\n   259→        const fresh = db.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n   260→        const currentMemberCount = (db\n   261→          .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   262→          .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   263→\n   264→        if (parsedNewSize < currentMemberCount) {\n   265→          return { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${currentMemberCount})` };\n   266→        }\n   267→\n   268→        if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {\n   269→          updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n   270→          values.push(0);\n   271→        }\n   272→      }\n   273→\n   274→      values.push(listingId);\n   275→      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n   276→      return null;\n   277→    });\n   278→\n   279→    const txResult = updateTransaction();\n   280→    if (txResult?.error) {\n   281→      return NextResponse.json({ error: txResult.error }, { status: 400 });\n   282→    }\n   283→\n   284→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   285→  } catch (error) {\n   286→    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n   287→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   288→  }\n   289→}\n   290→\n   291→export async function DELETE(\n   292→  _req: NextRequest,\n   293→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   294→) {\n   295→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   296→  if (!session) {\n   297→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   298→  }\n   299→\n   300→  const { id } = await params;\n   301→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   302→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   303→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   304→  }\n   305→\n   306→  const listing = db\n   307→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   308→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   309→\n   310→  if (!listing) {\n   311→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   312→  }\n   313→\n   314→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   315→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   316→  }\n   317→\n   318→  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n   319→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   320→    return NextResponse.json(\n   321→      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   322→      { status: 400 }\n   323→    );\n   324→  }\n   325→\n   326→  try {\n   327→    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n   328→    const members = db\n   329→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n   330→      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   331→\n   332→    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n   333→    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   334→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   335→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   336→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   337→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   338→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   339→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   340→    });\n   341→\n   342→    deleteTransaction();\n   343→\n   344→    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n   345→    for (const member of members) {\n   346→      try {\n   347→        createNotification(\n   348→          member.user_id,\n   349→          null,\n   350→          \"listing_deleted\",\n   351→          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n   352→        );\n   353→      } catch {\n   354→        // Notification failure should not block 364→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"62b04f1c-76fa-48e9-9804-d4ebc3006b6b","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:04:18.467Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  // Strip sensitive data from the response\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  // Always strip internal platform IDs — these are internal bot/channel identifiers\n  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id;\n  delete safeListingData.discord_channel_id;\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    // Strip invite links for non-members\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...safeListingData,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Pre-check member count (authoritative check happens inside transaction below)\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    // Track whether maxGroupSize change needs is_full recalculation\n    let needsIsFullRecalc = false;\n    let parsedNewSize = 0;\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      parsedNewSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(parsedNewSize);\n      needsIsFullRecalc = true;\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {\n        // Re-read member count and is_full inside transaction to prevent stale data\n        const fresh = db.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n        const currentMemberCount = (db\n          .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n          .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n        if (parsedNewSize < currentMemberCount) {\n          return { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${currentMemberCount})` };\n        }\n\n        if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {\n          updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n          values.push(0);\n        }\n      }\n\n      values.push(listingId);\n      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n      return null;\n    });\n\n    const txResult = updateTransaction();\n    if (txResult?.error) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: txResult.error }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","numLines":364,"startLine":1,"totalLines":364}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01VVnLVTQgoE8M8cuYfxVZvU","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  // Author is already a member — don't allow re-joining\n    30→  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are the organizer of this group\" }, { status: 400 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  if (listing.requires_approval) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json(\n    36→      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },\n    37→      { status: 400 }\n    38→    );\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  if (listing.is_full) {\n    42→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n    43→  }\n    44→\n    45→  // Check if already a member\n    46→  const existing = db\n    47→    .prepare(\n    48→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    49→    )\n    50→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    51→\n    52→  if (existing) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Check if user has a pending application (e.g., requires_approval was toggled off)\n    57→  const pendingApp = db\n    58→    .prepare(\n    59→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    60→    )\n    61→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    62→\n    63→  if (pendingApp) {\n    64→    return NextResponse.json(\n    65→      { error: \"You already have a pending application for this group\" },\n    66→      { status: 400 }\n    67→    );\n    68→  }\n    69→\n    70→  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n    71→  // Re-read max_group_size inside the transaction to avoid stale data from concurrent PATCH\n    72→  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    73→    const freshListing = db\n    74→      .prepare(\"SELECT max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    75→      .get(listingId) as { max_group_size: number } | undefined;\n    76→\n    77→    if (!freshListing) {\n    78→      return { error: \"Listing not found\", count: 0, maxSize: 0 };\n    79→    }\n    80→\n    81→    const { count } = db\n    82→      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    83→      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    84→\n    85→    if (count >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n    86→      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n    87→    }\n    88→\n    89→    db.prepare(\n    90→      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    91→    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n    92→\n    93→    const newCount = count + 1;\n    94→    if (newCount >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n    95→      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    96→    }\n    97→\n    98→    return { error: null, count: newCount, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n    99→  });\n   100→\n   101→  const result = joinTransaction();\n   102→\n   103→  if (result.error) {\n   104→    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n   105→  }\n   106→\n   107→  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n   108→  // When group just filled, skip new_member notification for the author\n   109→  // since they'll receive the more important group_full notification instead\n   110→  if (result.count === result.maxSize) {\n   111→    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n   112→  } else {\n   113→    notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n   114→  }\n   115→\n   116→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });\n   117→}\n   118→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"dac50f9c-fb45-44d7-a185-f3eb350fe475","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:04:23.378Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  // Author is already a member — don't allow re-joining\n  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are the organizer of this group\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.requires_approval) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if already a member\n  const existing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (existing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if user has a pending application (e.g., requires_approval was toggled off)\n  const pendingApp = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (pendingApp) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You already have a pending application for this group\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n  // Re-read max_group_size inside the transaction to avoid stale data from concurrent PATCH\n  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    const freshListing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { max_group_size: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!freshListing) {\n      return { error: \"Listing not found\", count: 0, maxSize: 0 };\n    }\n\n    const { count } = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n    if (count >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n    }\n\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    const newCount = count + 1;\n    if (newCount >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    }\n\n    return { error: null, count: newCount, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n  });\n\n  const result = joinTransaction();\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  // When group just filled, skip new_member notification for the author\n  // since they'll receive the more important group_full notification instead\n  if (result.count === result.maxSize) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  } else {\n    notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });\n}\n","numLines":118,"startLine":1,"totalLines":118}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_015LkBPS2At57QZ1DDHdbe91","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationReceived } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"You cannot apply to your own listing\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (!listing.requires_approval) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"This group does not require approval. Join directly.\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  if (listing.is_full) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n    45→  }\n    46→\n    47→  // Wrap membership check + application in a transaction to prevent TOCTOU races\n    48→  const applyTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    49→    // Check if already a member\n    50→    const isMember = db\n    51→      .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n    52→      .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    53→\n    54→    if (isMember) {\n    55→      return { error: \"You are already a member\", status: 400 };\n    56→    }\n    57→\n    58→    // Re-check is_full inside transaction\n    59→    const currentListing = db\n    60→      .prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    61→      .get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n    62→\n    63→    if (currentListing?.is_full) {\n    64→      return { error: \"This group is already full\", status: 400 };\n    65→    }\n    66→\n    67→    // Check if already applied (pending)\n    68→    const existingApp = db\n    69→      .prepare(\n    70→        \"SELECT id, status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    71→      )\n    72→      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { id: number; status: string } | undefined;\n    73→\n    74→    if (existingApp) {\n    75→      if (existingApp.status === \"pending\") {\n    76→        return { error: \"You have already applied\", status: 400 };\n    77→      }\n    78→      if (existingApp.status === \"approved\") {\n    79→        return { error: \"You are already approved\", status: 400 };\n    80→      }\n    81→      // If rejected, allow re-application by updating status back to pending\n    82→      db.prepare(\n    83→        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'pending', decided_at = NULL, applied_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    84→      ).run(existingApp.id);\n    85→\n    86→      return { error: null, status: 200 };\n    87→    }\n    88→\n    89→    // Insert new application\n    90→    db.prepare(\n    91→      \"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    92→    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n    93→\n    94→    return { error: null, status: 200 };\n    95→  });\n    96→\n    97→  const result = applyTransaction();\n    98→\n    99→  if (result.error) {\n   100→    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: result.status });\n   101→  }\n   102→\n   103→  // Notify outside transaction (fire-and-forget)\n   104→  notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n   105→\n   106→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   107→}\n   108→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"a630936a-1f6d-4c50-b126-15979520836a","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:04:23.749Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyApplicationReceived } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You cannot apply to your own listing\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.requires_approval) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This group does not require approval. Join directly.\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Wrap membership check + application in a transaction to prevent TOCTOU races\n  const applyTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    // Check if already a member\n    const isMember = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    if (isMember) {\n      return { error: \"You are already a member\", status: 400 };\n    }\n\n    // Re-check is_full inside transaction\n    const currentListing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (currentListing?.is_full) {\n      return { error: \"This group is already full\", status: 400 };\n    }\n\n    // Check if already applied (pending)\n    const existingApp = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT id, status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { id: number; status: string } | undefined;\n\n    if (existingApp) {\n      if (existingApp.status === \"pending\") {\n        return { error: \"You have already applied\", status: 400 };\n      }\n      if (existingApp.status === \"approved\") {\n        return { error: \"You are already approved\", status: 400 };\n      }\n      // If rejected, allow re-application by updating status back to pending\n      db.prepare(\n        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'pending', decided_at = NULL, applied_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n      ).run(existingApp.id);\n\n      return { error: null, status: 200 };\n    }\n\n    // Insert new application\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    return { error: null, status: 200 };\n  });\n\n  const result = applyTransaction();\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: result.status });\n  }\n\n  // Notify outside transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","numLines":108,"startLine":1,"totalLines":108}}}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"signature_delta","signature":""}},"session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"9b14fe84-df93-43f1-8307-a13693b984e8"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_018SrrD4igJCHQXvrHqaFhuj","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"Now I have a clear picture. Let me validate the findings:\n\n**Finding 1 (CRITICAL): Transaction mutates outer arrays** — Confirmed. Lines 214-215 declare `updates` and `values` outside the transaction, and lines 269-270 push to them inside the transaction. In `better-sqlite3`, the transaction function isn't retried automatically (it's not like some ORMs that retry on deadlock), but the structural issue is real — if this function were called twice, the arrays would accumulate. However, `better-sqlite3` transactions *do* serialize, so concurrent calls create new invocations of the outer function. \n\nThis is less critical than stated but still a code quality issue — the \"retry\" scenario is theoretical since `better-sqlite3` doesn't automatically retry transactions, just wraps them in BEGIN/COMMIT. But the structural fragility is valid and could break with future changes.\n\n**Finding 2 (CRITICAL): Missing `is_full = 1` when size equals member count** — CONFIRMED. The code at lines 264-271 only handles `<` (reject) and `> && is_full` (clear). It never sets `is_full = 1` when `parsedNewSize === currentMemberCount`, which is a genuine bug.\n\n**Finding 3 (IMPORTANT): Pending apps become orphaned when requires_approval toggled off** — CONFIRMED. The join endpoint blocks users with pending apps, but the author can't see them when requires_approval is false, and users can't re-apply either. They're stuck.\n\nThese are real bugs that need fixing. For finding 1, I'll move array mutations inside the transaction using local copies. For finding 2, I'll add the missing `=== currentMemberCount` branch. For finding 3, I'll auto-reject pending applications when `requires_approval` toggles from 1 to 0. I should also check if there are existing tests to update.","signature":""}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3114,"cache_read_input_tokens":35923,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":3114},"output_tokens":10,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"a0c86695-2500-4bbe-b3cb-c74cf7a27a93"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_018SrrD4igJCHQXvrHqaFhuj","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01EGM3e6FEfSvBSShprsD3vW","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh issue create \\\n  --title \"Code review round 13: PATCH transaction bugs, orphaned applications\" \\\n  --label \"approved,bug\" \\\n  --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Findings from code review round 13\n\n### 1. CRITICAL: PATCH transaction mutates outer arrays (structurally unsafe)\n**File:** `app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts` lines 214-275\n\nThe `updates` and `values` arrays are declared outside the `db.transaction()` closure but mutated inside it. While better-sqlite3 doesn't auto-retry, this pattern is fragile — if the transaction function were ever called more than once, the SQL statement would be corrupted with duplicate bindings.\n\n### 2. CRITICAL: `is_full` never set to 1 when `maxGroupSize` reduced to equal member count\n**File:** `app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts` lines 264-271\n\nWhen an author reduces `max_group_size` to exactly the current member count, `is_full` stays at 0. The listing remains visible in browse and appears joinable (though the join transaction rejects). Stale `is_full` flag.\n\n### 3. IMPORTANT: Users with pending apps become permanently locked out when `requires_approval` toggled off\n**Files:** `app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts` line 77, `join/route.ts` lines 56-68, `apply/route.ts` line 36\n\nWhen `requires_approval` switches from true to false:\n- Author can't see pending applicants (gated by `requires_approval` check)\n- Users can't join directly (blocked by pending app check)  \n- Users can't re-apply (blocked by `!requires_approval` check)\n- Users are stuck in limbo permanently\nEOF\n)\"","description":"Create issue for code review findings"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3114,"cache_read_input_tokens":35923,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":3114},"output_tokens":10,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"516d390e-caba-4084-82e3-3945396d0c25"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01H6Y1mXqpKVF5j4yyy14cRx","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01V8ThnZxAprUbyXXdGkx8oj","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","old_string":"    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {\n        // Re-read member count and is_full inside transaction to prevent stale data\n        const fresh = db.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n        const currentMemberCount = (db\n          .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n          .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n        if (parsedNewSize < currentMemberCount) {\n          return { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${currentMemberCount})` };\n        }\n\n        if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {\n          updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n          values.push(0);\n        }\n      }\n\n      values.push(listingId);\n      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n      return null;\n    });","new_string":"    // Check if requires_approval is being toggled off — need to handle orphaned pending apps\n    const togglingApprovalOff = requiresApproval === false && listing.requires_approval;\n\n    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n    // Use local copies of updates/values inside the transaction to avoid mutating outer arrays\n    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      const txUpdates = [...updates];\n      const txValues = [...values];\n\n      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {\n        // Re-read member count and is_full inside transaction to prevent stale data\n        const fresh = db.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n        const currentMemberCount = (db\n          .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n          .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n        if (parsedNewSize < currentMemberCount) {\n          return { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${currentMemberCount})` };\n        }\n\n        if (parsedNewSize === currentMemberCount && !fresh?.is_full) {\n          // Group is now exactly full — mark it\n          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n          txValues.push(1);\n        } else if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {\n          // Group has room now — reopen it\n          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n          txValues.push(0);\n        }\n      }\n\n      txValues.push(listingId);\n      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${txUpdates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...txValues);\n\n      // When requires_approval is toggled off, auto-reject orphaned pending applications\n      // so those users can join directly instead of being stuck in limbo\n      if (togglingApprovalOff) {\n        db.prepare(\n          \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n        ).run(listingId);\n      }\n\n      return null;\n    });"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":120,"cache_read_input_tokens":40124,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":120},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"293f2216-7a7f-474e-b338-318ad85d0347"}
