has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"4d85530a-906d-4511-b023-6a1b53a4c99e","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:05:08.597Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","oldString":"    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {\n        // Re-read member count and is_full inside transaction to prevent stale data\n        const fresh = db.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n        const currentMemberCount = (db\n          .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n          .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n        if (parsedNewSize < currentMemberCount) {\n          return { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${currentMemberCount})` };\n        }\n\n        if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {\n          updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n          values.push(0);\n        }\n      }\n\n      values.push(listingId);\n      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n      return null;\n    });","newString":"    // Check if requires_approval is being toggled off — need to handle orphaned pending apps\n    const togglingApprovalOff = requiresApproval === false && listing.requires_approval;\n\n    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n    // Use local copies of updates/values inside the transaction to avoid mutating outer arrays\n    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      const txUpdates = [...updates];\n      const txValues = [...values];\n\n      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {\n        // Re-read member count and is_full inside transaction to prevent stale data\n        const fresh = db.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n        const currentMemberCount = (db\n          .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n          .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n        if (parsedNewSize < currentMemberCount) {\n          return { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${currentMemberCount})` };\n        }\n\n        if (parsedNewSize === currentMemberCount && !fresh?.is_full) {\n          // Group is now exactly full — mark it\n          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n          txValues.push(1);\n        } else if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {\n          // Group has room now — reopen it\n          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n          txValues.push(0);\n        }\n      }\n\n      txValues.push(listingId);\n      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${txUpdates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...txValues);\n\n      // When requires_approval is toggled off, auto-reject orphaned pending applications\n      // so those users can join directly instead of being stuck in limbo\n      if (togglingApprovalOff) {\n        db.prepare(\n          \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n        ).run(listingId);\n      }\n\n      return null;\n    });","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  // Strip sensitive data from the response\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  // Always strip internal platform IDs — these are internal bot/channel identifiers\n  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id;\n  delete safeListingData.discord_channel_id;\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    // Strip invite links for non-members\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...safeListingData,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Pre-check member count (authoritative check happens inside transaction below)\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    // Track whether maxGroupSize change needs is_full recalculation\n    let needsIsFullRecalc = false;\n    let parsedNewSize = 0;\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      parsedNewSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(parsedNewSize);\n      needsIsFullRecalc = true;\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {\n        // Re-read member count and is_full inside transaction to prevent stale data\n        const fresh = db.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n        const currentMemberCount = (db\n          .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n          .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n        if (parsedNewSize < currentMemberCount) {\n          return { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${currentMemberCount})` };\n        }\n\n        if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {\n          updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n          values.push(0);\n        }\n      }\n\n      values.push(listingId);\n      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n      return null;\n    });\n\n    const txResult = updateTransaction();\n    if (txResult?.error) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: txResult.error }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":252,"oldLines":8,"newStart":252,"newLines":15,"lines":["       return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });","     }"," ","+    // Check if requires_approval is being toggled off — need to handle orphaned pending apps","+    const togglingApprovalOff = requiresApproval === false && listing.requires_approval;","+","     // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins","+    // Use local copies of updates/values inside the transaction to avoid mutating outer arrays","     const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {","+      const txUpdates = [...updates];","+      const txValues = [...values];","+","       if (needsIsFullRecalc) {","         // Re-read member count and is_full inside transaction to prevent stale data","         const fresh = db.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;"]},{"oldStart":265,"oldLines":14,"newStart":272,"newLines":28,"lines":["           return { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${currentMemberCount})` };","         }"," ","-        if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {","-          updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");","-          values.push(0);","+        if (parsedNewSize === currentMemberCount && !fresh?.is_full) {","+          // Group is now exactly full — mark it","+          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");","+          txValues.push(1);","+        } else if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {","+          // Group has room now — reopen it","+          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");","+          txValues.push(0);","         }","       }"," ","-      values.push(listingId);","-      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);","+      txValues.push(listingId);","+      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${txUpdates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...txValues);","+","+      // When requires_approval is toggled off, auto-reject orphaned pending applications","+      // so those users can join directly instead of being stuck in limbo","+      if (togglingApprovalOff) {","+        db.prepare(","+          \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"","+        ).run(listingId);","+      }","+","       return null;","     });"," "]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017zVcnwD8nrPrehfEdsSwy3","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"a7f2eda5-eabb-4089-b348-ebfcbe7f751a","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:05:15.402Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","oldString":"  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {","newString":"  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  // Show regardless of requires_approval — pending apps can exist after the flag is toggled off\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor) {","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  // Strip sensitive data from the response\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  // Always strip internal platform IDs — these are internal bot/channel identifiers\n  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id;\n  delete safeListingData.discord_channel_id;\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    // Strip invite links for non-members\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...safeListingData,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Pre-check member count (authoritative check happens inside transaction below)\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    // Track whether maxGroupSize change needs is_full recalculation\n    let needsIsFullRecalc = false;\n    let parsedNewSize = 0;\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      parsedNewSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(parsedNewSize);\n      needsIsFullRecalc = true;\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Check if requires_approval is being toggled off — need to handle orphaned pending apps\n    const togglingApprovalOff = requiresApproval === false && listing.requires_approval;\n\n    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n    // Use local copies of updates/values inside the transaction to avoid mutating outer arrays\n    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      const txUpdates = [...updates];\n      const txValues = [...values];\n\n      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {\n        // Re-read member count and is_full inside transaction to prevent stale data\n        const fresh = db.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n        const currentMemberCount = (db\n          .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n          .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n        if (parsedNewSize < currentMemberCount) {\n          return { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${currentMemberCount})` };\n        }\n\n        if (parsedNewSize === currentMemberCount && !fresh?.is_full) {\n          // Group is now exactly full — mark it\n          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n          txValues.push(1);\n        } else if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {\n          // Group has room now — reopen it\n          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n          txValues.push(0);\n        }\n      }\n\n      txValues.push(listingId);\n      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${txUpdates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...txValues);\n\n      // When requires_approval is toggled off, auto-reject orphaned pending applications\n      // so those users can join directly instead of being stuck in limbo\n      if (togglingApprovalOff) {\n        db.prepare(\n          \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n        ).run(listingId);\n      }\n\n      return null;\n    });\n\n    const txResult = updateTransaction();\n    if (txResult?.error) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: txResult.error }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":73,"oldLines":8,"newStart":73,"newLines":9,"lines":["   }"," ","   // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author","+  // Show regardless of requires_approval — pending apps can exist after the flag is toggled off","   let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];","-  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {","+  if (isAuthor) {","     pendingApplicants = db","       .prepare(","         `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01PEBFSLk3xv6kZWfdHPa2bC","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\n     2→import { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n     3→\n     4→const testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n     5→  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n     6→  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n     7→  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n     8→  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n     9→  db.exec(`\n    10→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n    11→      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    12→      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n    13→      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n    14→      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n    15→      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    16→      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    17→    );\n    18→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n    19→      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    20→      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    21→      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n    22→      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n    23→      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    24→      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    25→      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n    26→      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n    27→      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n    28→      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n    29→      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n    30→      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    31→      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    32→      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    33→      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n    34→      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    35→      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    36→      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n    37→      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    38→      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    39→    );\n    40→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n    41→      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    42→      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    43→      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    44→      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n    45→      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    46→      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    47→    );\n    48→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_applications (\n    49→      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    50→      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    51→      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    52→      status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'\n    53→        CHECK(status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'rejected')),\n    54→      message TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    55→      applied_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    56→      decided_at TEXT,\n    57→      UNIQUE(listing_id, user_id),\n    58→      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    59→      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    60→    );\n    61→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n    62→      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    63→      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    64→      listing_id INTEGER,\n    65→      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n    66→      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n    67→      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    68→      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    69→      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    70→    );\n    71→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n    72→      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    73→      telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    74→      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    75→      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id),\n    76→      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n    77→    );\n { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_applications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'\n        CHECK(status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'rejected')),\n      message TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      applied_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      decided_at TEXT,\n      UNIQUE(listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      listing_id INTEGER,\n      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ratings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      rater_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      rated_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      score INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(score >= 1 AND score <= 5),\n      comment TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      UNIQUE(listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (rater_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (rated_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockSession = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  userId: undefined as number | undefined,\n  email: undefined as string | undefined,\n  displayName: undefined as string | undefined,\n  save: vi.fn(),\n  destroy: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/session\", () => ({\n  getSession: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(mockSession),\n  requireAuth: vi.fn().mockImplementation(async () => {\n    if (!mockSession.userId) return null;\n    return mockSession;\n  }),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/notifications\", () => ({\n  createNotification: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/telegram\", () => ({\n  isBotConfigured: vi.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/discord\", () => ({\n  isBotConfigured: vi.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n}));\n\nconst { GET, PATCH, DELETE: DELETE_HANDLER } = await import(\"@/app/api/listings/[id]/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\").run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    book_title: string;\n    book_author: string;\n    meeting_format: string;\n    max_group_size: number;\n    is_full: number;\n    requires_approval: number;\n    telegram_link: string;\n    discord_link: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb.prepare(\n    `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, requires_approval, telegram_link, discord_link)\n     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n  ).run(\n    authorId,\n    overrides.book_title ?? \"Test Book\",\n    overrides.book_author ?? \"Test Author\",\n    \"1ch/wk\",\n    \"2026-04-01\",\n    overrides.meeting_format ?? \"text\",\n    overrides.max_group_size ?? 5,\n    overrides.is_full ?? 0,\n    overrides.requires_approval ?? 0,\n    overrides.telegram_link ?? \"\",\n    overrides.discord_link ?? \"\"\n  );\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction addMember(listingId: number, userId: number) {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, userId);\n}\n\nfunction createParams(id: string) {\n  return { params: Promise.resolve({ id }) };\n}\n\ndescribe(\"GET /api/listings/[id]\", () => {\n  let authorId: number;\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM ratings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    authorId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid listing ID\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/abc\");\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(\"abc\"));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n    expect(data.error).toBe(\"Invalid listing ID\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 for non-existent listing\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/999\");\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(\"999\"));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n    expect(data.error).toBe(\"Listing not found\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns listing details with members\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse<{ listing: Record<string, unknown> }>(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.listing.book_title).toBe(\"Test Book\");\n    expect(data.listing.author_name).toBe(\"Test User\");\n    expect(data.listing.memberCount).toBe(1);\n    expect(data.listing.isMember).toBe(false);\n    expect(data.listing.isAuthor).toBe(false);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns isMember=true when session user is a member\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ listing: Record<string, unknown> }>(response);\n\n    expect(data.listing.isMember).toBe(true);\n    expect(data.listing.isAuthor).toBe(true);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 for full listing when user is not a member\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const user2 = insertUser(\"other@example.com\", \"Other\");\n    mockSession.userId = user2;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n    expect(data.error).toBe(\"This listing is no longer available\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns listing for full listing when user is the author\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n  });\n\n  it(\"shows pending applicants to the author\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { requires_approval: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n\n    const applicant = insertUser(\"applicant@example.com\", \"Applicant\");\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'pending')\").run(listingId, applicant);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ listing: { pendingApplicants: unknown[] } }>(response);\n\n    expect(data.listing.pendingApplicants.length).toBe(1);\n  });\n\n  it(\"shows hasApplied status for applicants\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { requires_approval: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const applicant = insertUser(\"applicant@example.com\", \"Applicant\");\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'pending')\").run(listingId, applicant);\n    mockSession.userId = applicant;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ listing: { hasApplied: boolean; applicationStatus: string } }>(response);\n\n    expect(data.listing.hasApplied).toBe(true);\n    expect(data.listing.applicationStatus).toBe(\"pending\");\n  });\n});\n\ndescribe(\"PATCH /api/listings/[id]\", () => {\n  let authorId: number;\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM ratings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    authorId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n    mockSession.email = \"test@example.com\";\n    mockSession.displayName = \"Test User\";\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 when not authenticated\", async () => {\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid listing ID\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/abc\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(\"abc\"));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 for non-existent listing\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/999\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(\"999\"));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when non-author tries to edit\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@example.com\", \"Other\");\n    mockSession.userId = otherId;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n    expect(data.error).toBe(\"Only the author can edit this listing\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when listing has telegram link shared\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { telegram_link: \"https://t.me/test\" });\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"updates listing fields successfully\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\", meetingFormat: \"voice\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.success).toBe(true);\n\n    const updated = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT language, meeting_format FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as Record<string, string>;\n    expect(updated.language).toBe(\"French\");\n    expect(updated.meeting_format).toBe(\"voice\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid meeting format\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { meetingFormat: \"invalid\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when no fields to update\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: {},\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n    expect(data.error).toBe(\"No fields to update\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"prevents reducing group size below current member count\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { max_group_size: 5 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    const u2 = insertUser(\"u2@test.com\", \"U2\");\n    addMember(listingId, u2);\n    const u3 = insertUser(\"u3@test.com\", \"U3\");\n    addMember(listingId, u3);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { maxGroupSize: \"2\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n    expect(data.error).toContain(\"Cannot reduce group size\");\n  });\n});\n\ndescribe(\"DELETE /api/listings/[id]\", () => {\n  let authorId: number;\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM ratings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    authorId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n    mockSession.email = \"test@example.com\";\n    mockSession.displayName = \"Test User\";\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 when not authenticated\", async () => {\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n    const response = await DELETE_HANDLER(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when non-author tries to delete\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@example.com\", \"Other\");\n    mockSession.userId = otherId;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n    const response = await DELETE_HANDLER(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when listing has chat link shared\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { telegram_link: \"https://t.me/test\" });\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n    const response = await DELETE_HANDLER(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"deletes listing and related data successfully\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n    const response = await DELETE_HANDLER(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.success).toBe(true);\n\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId);\n    expect(listing).toBeUndefined();\n\n    const members = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").all(listingId);\n    expect(members.length).toBe(0);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 for non-existent listing\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/999\", { method: \"DELETE\" });\n    const response = await DELETE_HANDLER(req, createParams(\"999\"));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n  });\n});\n","numLines":513,"startLine":1,"totalLines":513}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01Ts4QwgYBzj6vyqNhqrqRHy","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Amg8aEo9EY8bCWnLVhgAM7","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/listings/listing-detail.test.ts","old_string":"  it(\"prevents reducing group size below current member count\", async () => {","new_string":"  it(\"sets is_full=1 when maxGroupSize reduced to equal member count\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { max_group_size: 5 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    const u2 = insertUser(\"u2b@test.com\", \"U2B\");\n    addMember(listingId, u2);\n    const u3 = insertUser(\"u3b@test.com\", \"U3B\");\n    addMember(listingId, u3);\n    // 3 members, reduce size to 3\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { maxGroupSize: 3 },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.success).toBe(true);\n\n    const updated = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT is_full, max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number; max_group_size: number };\n    expect(updated.max_group_size).toBe(3);\n    expect(updated.is_full).toBe(1);\n  });\n\n  it(\"auto-rejects pending applications when requires_approval is toggled off\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { requires_approval: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const applicant = insertUser(\"applicant@test.com\", \"Applicant\");\n    testDb.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'pending')\"\n    ).run(listingId, applicant);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { requiresApproval: false },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.success).toBe(true);\n\n    // Check that the application was auto-rejected\n    const app = testDb.prepare(\n      \"SELECT status, decided_at FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    ).get(listingId, applicant) as { status: string; decided_at: string };\n    expect(app.status).toBe(\"rejected\");\n    expect(app.decided_at).toBeTruthy();\n\n    // Check that the listing no longer requires approval\n    const updated = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT requires_approval FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { requires_approval: number };\n    expect(updated.requires_approval).toBe(0);\n  });\n\n  it(\"prevents reducing group size below current member count\", async () => {"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":7382,"cache_read_input_tokens":42290,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":7382},"output_tokens":4,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"5df25a71-6c9e-4ee3-8199-2f1dbf457cfc"}
