max_group_size: number };\n    expect(updated.max_group_size).toBe(3);\n    expect(updated.is_full).toBe(1);\n  });\n\n  it(\"auto-rejects pending applications when requires_approval is toggled off\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { requires_approval: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const applicant = insertUser(\"applicant@test.com\", \"Applicant\");\n    testDb.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'pending')\"\n    ).run(listingId, applicant);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { requiresApproval: false },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.success).toBe(true);\n\n    // Check that the application was auto-rejected\n    const app = testDb.prepare(\n      \"SELECT status, decided_at FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    ).get(listingId, applicant) as { status: string; decided_at: string };\n    expect(app.status).toBe(\"rejected\");\n    expect(app.decided_at).toBeTruthy();\n\n    // Check that the listing no longer requires approval\n    const updated = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT requires_approval FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { requires_approval: number };\n    expect(updated.requires_approval).toBe(0);\n  });\n\n  it(\"prevents reducing group size below current member count\", async () => {","originalFile":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_applications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'\n        CHECK(status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'rejected')),\n      message TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      applied_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      decided_at TEXT,\n      UNIQUE(listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      listing_id INTEGER,\n      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ratings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      rater_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      rated_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      score INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(score >= 1 AND score <= 5),\n      comment TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      UNIQUE(listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (rater_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (rated_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockSession = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  userId: undefined as number | undefined,\n  email: undefined as string | undefined,\n  displayName: undefined as string | undefined,\n  save: vi.fn(),\n  destroy: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/session\", () => ({\n  getSession: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(mockSession),\n  requireAuth: vi.fn().mockImplementation(async () => {\n    if (!mockSession.userId) return null;\n    return mockSession;\n  }),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/notifications\", () => ({\n  createNotification: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/telegram\", () => ({\n  isBotConfigured: vi.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/discord\", () => ({\n  isBotConfigured: vi.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n}));\n\nconst { GET, PATCH, DELETE: DELETE_HANDLER } = await import(\"@/app/api/listings/[id]/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\").run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    book_title: string;\n    book_author: string;\n    meeting_format: string;\n    max_group_size: number;\n    is_full: number;\n    requires_approval: number;\n    telegram_link: string;\n    discord_link: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb.prepare(\n    `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, requires_approval, telegram_link, discord_link)\n     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n  ).run(\n    authorId,\n    overrides.book_title ?? \"Test Book\",\n    overrides.book_author ?? \"Test Author\",\n    \"1ch/wk\",\n    \"2026-04-01\",\n    overrides.meeting_format ?? \"text\",\n    overrides.max_group_size ?? 5,\n    overrides.is_full ?? 0,\n    overrides.requires_approval ?? 0,\n    overrides.telegram_link ?? \"\",\n    overrides.discord_link ?? \"\"\n  );\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction addMember(listingId: number, userId: number) {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, userId);\n}\n\nfunction createParams(id: string) {\n  return { params: Promise.resolve({ id }) };\n}\n\ndescribe(\"GET /api/listings/[id]\", () => {\n  let authorId: number;\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM ratings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    authorId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid listing ID\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/abc\");\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(\"abc\"));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n    expect(data.error).toBe(\"Invalid listing ID\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 for non-existent listing\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/999\");\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(\"999\"));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n    expect(data.error).toBe(\"Listing not found\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns listing details with members\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse<{ listing: Record<string, unknown> }>(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.listing.book_title).toBe(\"Test Book\");\n    expect(data.listing.author_name).toBe(\"Test User\");\n    expect(data.listing.memberCount).toBe(1);\n    expect(data.listing.isMember).toBe(false);\n    expect(data.listing.isAuthor).toBe(false);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns isMember=true when session user is a member\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ listing: Record<string, unknown> }>(response);\n\n    expect(data.listing.isMember).toBe(true);\n    expect(data.listing.isAuthor).toBe(true);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 for full listing when user is not a member\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const user2 = insertUser(\"other@example.com\", \"Other\");\n    mockSession.userId = user2;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n    expect(data.error).toBe(\"This listing is no longer available\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns listing for full listing when user is the author\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n  });\n\n  it(\"shows pending applicants to the author\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { requires_approval: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n\n    const applicant = insertUser(\"applicant@example.com\", \"Applicant\");\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'pending')\").run(listingId, applicant);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ listing: { pendingApplicants: unknown[] } }>(response);\n\n    expect(data.listing.pendingApplicants.length).toBe(1);\n  });\n\n  it(\"shows hasApplied status for applicants\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { requires_approval: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const applicant = insertUser(\"applicant@example.com\", \"Applicant\");\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'pending')\").run(listingId, applicant);\n    mockSession.userId = applicant;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ listing: { hasApplied: boolean; applicationStatus: string } }>(response);\n\n    expect(data.listing.hasApplied).toBe(true);\n    expect(data.listing.applicationStatus).toBe(\"pending\");\n  });\n});\n\ndescribe(\"PATCH /api/listings/[id]\", () => {\n  let authorId: number;\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM ratings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    authorId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n    mockSession.email = \"test@example.com\";\n    mockSession.displayName = \"Test User\";\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 when not authenticated\", async () => {\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid listing ID\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/abc\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(\"abc\"));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 for non-existent listing\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/999\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(\"999\"));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when non-author tries to edit\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@example.com\", \"Other\");\n    mockSession.userId = otherId;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n    expect(data.error).toBe(\"Only the author can edit this listing\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when listing has telegram link shared\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { telegram_link: \"https://t.me/test\" });\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"updates listing fields successfully\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\", meetingFormat: \"voice\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.success).toBe(true);\n\n    const updated = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT language, meeting_format FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as Record<string, string>;\n    expect(updated.language).toBe(\"French\");\n    expect(updated.meeting_format).toBe(\"voice\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid meeting format\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { meetingFormat: \"invalid\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when no fields to update\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: {},\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n    expect(data.error).toBe(\"No fields to update\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"prevents reducing group size below current member count\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { max_group_size: 5 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    const u2 = insertUser(\"u2@test.com\", \"U2\");\n    addMember(listingId, u2);\n    const u3 = insertUser(\"u3@test.com\", \"U3\");\n    addMember(listingId, u3);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { maxGroupSize: \"2\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n    expect(data.error).toContain(\"Cannot reduce group size\");\n  });\n});\n\ndescribe(\"DELETE /api/listings/[id]\", () => {\n  let authorId: number;\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM ratings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    authorId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n    mockSession.email = \"test@example.com\";\n    mockSession.displayName = \"Test User\";\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 when not authenticated\", async () => {\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n    const response = await DELETE_HANDLER(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when non-author tries to delete\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@example.com\", \"Other\");\n    mockSession.userId = otherId;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n    const response = await DELETE_HANDLER(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when listing has chat link shared\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { telegram_link: \"https://t.me/test\" });\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n    const response = await DELETE_HANDLER(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"deletes listing and related data successfully\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n    const response = await DELETE_HANDLER(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.success).toBe(true);\n\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId);\n    expect(listing).toBeUndefined();\n\n    const members = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").all(listingId);\n    expect(members.length).toBe(0);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 for non-existent listing\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/999\", { method: \"DELETE\" });\n    const response = await DELETE_HANDLER(req, createParams(\"999\"));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n  });\n});\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":415,"oldLines":6,"newStart":415,"newLines":61,"lines":["     expect(data.error).toBe(\"No fields to update\");","   });"," ","+  it(\"sets is_full=1 when maxGroupSize reduced to equal member count\", async () => {","+    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { max_group_size: 5 });","+    addMember(listingId, authorId);","+    const u2 = insertUser(\"u2b@test.com\", \"U2B\");","+    addMember(listingId, u2);","+    const u3 = insertUser(\"u3b@test.com\", \"U3B\");","+    addMember(listingId, u3);","+    // 3 members, reduce size to 3","+","+    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {","+      method: \"PATCH\",","+      body: { maxGroupSize: 3 },","+    });","+    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));","+    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);","+","+    expect(status).toBe(200);","+    expect(data.success).toBe(true);","+","+    const updated = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT is_full, max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number; max_group_size: number };","+    expect(updated.max_group_size).toBe(3);","+    expect(updated.is_full).toBe(1);","+  });","+","+  it(\"auto-rejects pending applications when requires_approval is toggled off\", async () => {","+    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { requires_approval: 1 });","+    addMember(listingId, authorId);","+","+    const applicant = insertUser(\"applicant@test.com\", \"Applicant\");","+    testDb.prepare(","+      \"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'pending')\"","+    ).run(listingId, applicant);","+","+    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {","+      method: \"PATCH\",","+      body: { requiresApproval: false },","+    });","+    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));","+    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);","+","+    expect(status).toBe(200);","+    expect(data.success).toBe(true);","+","+    // Check that the application was auto-rejected","+    const app = testDb.prepare(","+      \"SELECT status, decided_at FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"","+    ).get(listingId, applicant) as { status: string; decided_at: string };","+    expect(app.status).toBe(\"rejected\");","+    expect(app.decided_at).toBeTruthy();","+","+    // Check that the listing no longer requires approval","+    const updated = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT requires_approval FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { requires_approval: number };","+    expect(updated.requires_approval).toBe(0);","+  });","+","   it(\"prevents reducing group size below current member count\", async () => {","     const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { max_group_size: 5 });","     addMember(listingId, authorId);"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01XUZfKBrNGJk6KsFDcJYdwo","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01G9vcukZiuuJGWXHSWfyMj2","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/listings/listing-detail.test.ts","old_string":"  it(\"shows hasApplied status for applicants\", async () => {","new_string":"  it(\"shows pending applicants to author even when requires_approval is off\", async () => {\n    // This tests the fix for orphaned applications being invisible to authors\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { requires_approval: 0 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n\n    const applicant = insertUser(\"orphan@example.com\", \"Orphan\");\n    // Simulate a pending application that was created before requires_approval was toggled off\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'pending')\").run(listingId, applicant);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ listing: { pendingApplicants: unknown[] } }>(response);\n\n    expect(data.listing.pendingApplicants.length).toBe(1);\n  });\n\n  it(\"shows hasApplied status for applicants\", async () => {"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1050,"cache_read_input_tokens":49672,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1050},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"e57dba67-aeba-4250-b6a5-5c354e0d1ac9"}

\"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_applications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'\n        CHECK(status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'rejected')),\n      message TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      applied_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      decided_at TEXT,\n      UNIQUE(listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      listing_id INTEGER,\n      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ratings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      rater_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      rated_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      score INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(score >= 1 AND score <= 5),\n      comment TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      UNIQUE(listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (rater_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (rated_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockSession = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  userId: undefined as number | undefined,\n  email: undefined as string | undefined,\n  displayName: undefined as string | undefined,\n  save: vi.fn(),\n  destroy: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/session\", () => ({\n  getSession: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(mockSession),\n  requireAuth: vi.fn().mockImplementation(async () => {\n    if (!mockSession.userId) return null;\n    return mockSession;\n  }),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/notifications\", () => ({\n  createNotification: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/telegram\", () => ({\n  isBotConfigured: vi.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/discord\", () => ({\n  isBotConfigured: vi.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n}));\n\nconst { GET, PATCH, DELETE: DELETE_HANDLER } = await import(\"@/app/api/listings/[id]/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\").run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    book_title: string;\n    book_author: string;\n    meeting_format: string;\n    max_group_size: number;\n    is_full: number;\n    requires_approval: number;\n    telegram_link: string;\n    discord_link: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb.prepare(\n    `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, requires_approval, telegram_link, discord_link)\n     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n  ).run(\n    authorId,\n    overrides.book_title ?? \"Test Book\",\n    overrides.book_author ?? \"Test Author\",\n    \"1ch/wk\",\n    \"2026-04-01\",\n    overrides.meeting_format ?? \"text\",\n    overrides.max_group_size ?? 5,\n    overrides.is_full ?? 0,\n    overrides.requires_approval ?? 0,\n    overrides.telegram_link ?? \"\",\n    overrides.discord_link ?? \"\"\n  );\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction addMember(listingId: number, userId: number) {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, userId);\n}\n\nfunction createParams(id: string) {\n  return { params: Promise.resolve({ id }) };\n}\n\ndescribe(\"GET /api/listings/[id]\", () => {\n  let authorId: number;\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM ratings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    authorId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid listing ID\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/abc\");\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(\"abc\"));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n    expect(data.error).toBe(\"Invalid listing ID\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 for non-existent listing\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/999\");\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(\"999\"));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n    expect(data.error).toBe(\"Listing not found\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns listing details with members\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse<{ listing: Record<string, unknown> }>(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.listing.book_title).toBe(\"Test Book\");\n    expect(data.listing.author_name).toBe(\"Test User\");\n    expect(data.listing.memberCount).toBe(1);\n    expect(data.listing.isMember).toBe(false);\n    expect(data.listing.isAuthor).toBe(false);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns isMember=true when session user is a member\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ listing: Record<string, unknown> }>(response);\n\n    expect(data.listing.isMember).toBe(true);\n    expect(data.listing.isAuthor).toBe(true);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 for full listing when user is not a member\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const user2 = insertUser(\"other@example.com\", \"Other\");\n    mockSession.userId = user2;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n    expect(data.error).toBe(\"This listing is no longer available\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns listing for full listing when user is the author\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n  });\n\n  it(\"shows pending applicants to the author\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { requires_approval: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n\n    const applicant = insertUser(\"applicant@example.com\", \"Applicant\");\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'pending')\").run(listingId, applicant);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ listing: { pendingApplicants: unknown[] } }>(response);\n\n    expect(data.listing.pendingApplicants.length).toBe(1);\n  });\n\n  it(\"shows hasApplied status for applicants\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { requires_approval: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const applicant = insertUser(\"applicant@example.com\", \"Applicant\");\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'pending')\").run(listingId, applicant);\n    mockSession.userId = applicant;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ listing: { hasApplied: boolean; applicationStatus: string } }>(response);\n\n    expect(data.listing.hasApplied).toBe(true);\n    expect(data.listing.applicationStatus).toBe(\"pending\");\n  });\n});\n\ndescribe(\"PATCH /api/listings/[id]\", () => {\n  let authorId: number;\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM ratings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    authorId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n    mockSession.email = \"test@example.com\";\n    mockSession.displayName = \"Test User\";\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 when not authenticated\", async () => {\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid listing ID\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/abc\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(\"abc\"));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 for non-existent listing\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/999\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(\"999\"));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when non-author tries to edit\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@example.com\", \"Other\");\n    mockSession.userId = otherId;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n    expect(data.error).toBe(\"Only the author can edit this listing\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when listing has telegram link shared\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { telegram_link: \"https://t.me/test\" });\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"updates listing fields successfully\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\", meetingFormat: \"voice\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.success).toBe(true);\n\n    const updated = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT language, meeting_format FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as Record<string, string>;\n    expect(updated.language).toBe(\"French\");\n    expect(updated.meeting_format).toBe(\"voice\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid meeting format\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { meetingFormat: \"invalid\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when no fields to update\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: {},\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n    expect(data.error).toBe(\"No fields to update\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"sets is_full=1 when maxGroupSize reduced to equal member count\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { max_group_size: 5 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    const u2 = insertUser(\"u2b@test.com\", \"U2B\");\n    addMember(listingId, u2);\n    const u3 = insertUser(\"u3b@test.com\", \"U3B\");\n    addMember(listingId, u3);\n    // 3 members, reduce size to 3\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { maxGroupSize: 3 },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.success).toBe(true);\n\n    const updated = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT is_full, max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number; max_group_size: number };\n    expect(updated.max_group_size).toBe(3);\n    expect(updated.is_full).toBe(1);\n  });\n\n  it(\"auto-rejects pending applications when requires_approval is toggled off\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { requires_approval: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const applicant = insertUser(\"applicant@test.com\", \"Applicant\");\n    testDb.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'pending')\"\n    ).run(listingId, applicant);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { requiresApproval: false },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.success).toBe(true);\n\n    // Check that the application was auto-rejected\n    const app = testDb.prepare(\n      \"SELECT status, decided_at FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    ).get(listingId, applicant) as { status: string; decided_at: string };\n    expect(app.status).toBe(\"rejected\");\n    expect(app.decided_at).toBeTruthy();\n\n    // Check that the listing no longer requires approval\n    const updated = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT requires_approval FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { requires_approval: number };\n    expect(updated.requires_approval).toBe(0);\n  });\n\n  it(\"prevents reducing group size below current member count\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { max_group_size: 5 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    const u2 = insertUser(\"u2@test.com\", \"U2\");\n    addMember(listingId, u2);\n    const u3 = insertUser(\"u3@test.com\", \"U3\");\n    addMember(listingId, u3);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { maxGroupSize: \"2\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n    expect(data.error).toContain(\"Cannot reduce group size\");\n  });\n});\n\ndescribe(\"DELETE /api/listings/[id]\", () => {\n  let authorId: number;\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM ratings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    authorId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n    mockSession.email = \"test@example.com\";\n    mockSession.displayName = \"Test User\";\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 when not authenticated\", async () => {\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n    const response = await DELETE_HANDLER(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when non-author tries to delete\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@example.com\", \"Other\");\n    mockSession.userId = otherId;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n    const response = await DELETE_HANDLER(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when listing has chat link shared\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { telegram_link: \"https://t.me/test\" });\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n    const response = await DELETE_HANDLER(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"deletes listing and related data successfully\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n    const response = await DELETE_HANDLER(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.success).toBe(true);\n\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId);\n    expect(listing).toBeUndefined();\n\n    const members = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").all(listingId);\n    expect(members.length).toBe(0);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 for non-existent listing\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/999\", { method: \"DELETE\" });\n    const response = await DELETE_HANDLER(req, createParams(\"999\"));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n  });\n});\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":272,"oldLines":6,"newStart":272,"newLines":23,"lines":["     expect(data.listing.pendingApplicants.length).toBe(1);","   });"," ","+  it(\"shows pending applicants to author even when requires_approval is off\", async () => {","+    // This tests the fix for orphaned applications being invisible to authors","+    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { requires_approval: 0 });","+    addMember(listingId, authorId);","+    mockSession.userId = authorId;","+","+    const applicant = insertUser(\"orphan@example.com\", \"Orphan\");","+    // Simulate a pending application that was created before requires_approval was toggled off","+    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'pending')\").run(listingId, applicant);","+","+    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);","+    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));","+    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ listing: { pendingApplicants: unknown[] } }>(response);","+","+    expect(data.listing.pendingApplicants.length).toBe(1);","+  });","+","   it(\"shows hasApplied status for applicants\", async () => {","     const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { requires_approval: 1 });","     addMember(listingId, authorId);"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_014w6gb1NEi8zpB2Ymgn358h","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01CjSLWPecGD5M1PCuj3wojS","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"git commit -m \"$(cat <<'EOF'\nfix: PATCH is_full gap, transaction safety, orphaned applications (#100)\n\n1. Fix is_full never set to 1 when maxGroupSize reduced to exactly equal\n   current member count — listing remained visible and joinable in browse\n2. Move updates/values array mutations inside transaction using local\n   copies to prevent structural corruption on any retry path\n3. Auto-reject pending applications when requires_approval is toggled off\n   to prevent users being permanently locked out of joining\n4. Show pending applicants to author regardless of requires_approval flag\n\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>\nEOF\n)\"","description":"Commit changes"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":144,"cache_read_input_tokens":51729,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":144},"output_tokens":51,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"70502cb1-9618-4df0-a958-749860c5c3d6"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01AasLZS4JERfDRzvBgBLSYR","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01NbfEXizcJjtnaxPJwPJ8cv","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh pr create --title \"fix: PATCH is_full gap, transaction safety, orphaned applications\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Summary\nFixes 3 bugs found in code review round 13 (#100):\n\n- **CRITICAL: `is_full` never set to 1 when `maxGroupSize` reduced to exactly equal member count** — listing remained visible in browse and appeared joinable (though join transaction would reject). Added the missing `=== currentMemberCount` branch.\n- **CRITICAL: Transaction mutates outer `updates`/`values` arrays** — structurally unsafe pattern that would corrupt SQL if the transaction function were called more than once. Fixed by using local copies (`txUpdates`/`txValues`) inside the transaction.\n- **IMPORTANT: Users permanently locked out when `requires_approval` toggled off** — pending applicants became invisible to the author and blocked from direct join or re-application. Now auto-rejects pending applications when `requires_approval` is toggled from true to false, and shows pending applicants to the author regardless of the flag.\n\n## Test plan\n- [x] Added test: `is_full` set to 1 when `maxGroupSize` reduced to equal member count\n- [x] Added test: pending applications auto-rejected when `requires_approval` toggled off\n- [x] Added test: pending applicants visible to author even when `requires_approval` is off\n- [x] All 201 tests pass (3 new)\n- [x] ESLint clean\n- [x] Build passes\n\n🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)\nEOF\n)\"","description":"Create PR"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":281,"cache_read_input_tokens":52170,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":281},"output_tokens":64,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"8eece0dd-b033-44e6-9eb0-37e705a4f5b2"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01J4nJoLVwaZ2pGXLAN7Lv2B","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01HvNYLNMfgtqJMwKY9H6fPp","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/session-2026-03-24-1000.md","content":"# Session Log — 2026-03-24 10:00 UTC\n\n## Summary\nCode review round 13: found and fixed 3 bugs in PATCH endpoint and application lifecycle. Created issue #100, implemented fixes in PR #101, CI passed, merged to main, deployed to production.\n\n## Review Findings\n- **Production**: Healthy — HTTP 200, PM2 online, 201 tests pass\n- **CI**: Green on main\n- **Open PRs**: None\n- **Open issues**: #54 (needs-human, PAT expiry), #21 (needs-human, Telegram token)\n- **PRD sync**: All PRD features have corresponding closed issues\n\n## Work Completed\n\n### Issue #100: Code review round 13 (PR #101 — merged + deployed)\n\n3 fixes:\n\n1. **`is_full` never set to 1 when `maxGroupSize` reduced to equal member count** (CRITICAL) — The PATCH handler only checked `< currentMemberCount` (reject) and `> currentMemberCount && is_full` (reopen), but missed the `=== currentMemberCount` case. When an author reduced group size to exactly the current count, `is_full` stayed 0, leaving the listing visible in browse and appearing joinable. Added the missing equality branch.\n\n2. **Transaction mutates outer `updates`/`values` arrays** (CRITICAL) — The `updates` and `values` arrays were declared outside the `db.transaction()` closure but mutated inside it via `.push()`. Structurally unsafe — any retry or double-call would corrupt the SQL with duplicate bindings. Fixed by creating local copies (`txUpdates`/`txValues`) inside the transaction.\n\n3. **Users permanently locked out when `requires_approval` toggled off** (IMPORTANT) — When an author toggled `requires_approval` from true to false, users with pending applications became stuck: invisible to the author (gated by `requires_approval` check), blocked from direct join (pending app check), and blocked from re-apply (flag check). Fixed by auto-rejecting pending applications in the PATCH transaction when `requires_approval` is toggled off, and showing pending applicants to the author regardless of the flag.\n\nAll 201 tests pass (3 new), ESLint clean, build clean, CI green.\n\n## Also Noted (not fixed this round)\n- `notifyGroupFull` reads `platform_preference` outside the join transaction\n- `BOT_TOKEN` / `CLIENT_ID` captured at module load time\n- No `ON DELETE CASCADE` on FK constraints\n- `requireAuth` does not re-validate user existence in DB (low risk — no admin deletion UI)\n\n## Issues Monitored\n- **#54 (PAT expiry)**: Critical — needs-human\n- **#21 (Telegram token)**: Still needs-human\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. Check production health\n2. Monitor PAT expiry (#54) — critical\n3. Consider E2E testing, performance improvements, or new feature proposals\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":114,"cache_read_input_tokens":54561,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":114},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"ff12f550-4732-45e8-a087-898c8ee35c36"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HvNYLNMfgtqJMwKY9H6fPp","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/session-2026-03-24-1000.md"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"3e8ff3e5-8590-45da-9a74-4833a465a012","timestamp":"2026-03-24T10:09:27.851Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"create","filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/session-2026-03-24-1000.md","content":"# Session Log — 2026-03-24 10:00 UTC\n\n## Summary\nCode review round 13: found and fixed 3 bugs in PATCH endpoint and application lifecycle. Created issue #100, implemented fixes in PR #101, CI passed, merged to main, deployed to production.\n\n## Review Findings\n- **Production**: Healthy — HTTP 200, PM2 online, 201 tests pass\n- **CI**: Green on main\n- **Open PRs**: None\n- **Open issues**: #54 (needs-human, PAT expiry), #21 (needs-human, Telegram token)\n- **PRD sync**: All PRD features have corresponding closed issues\n\n## Work Completed\n\n### Issue #100: Code review round 13 (PR #101 — merged + deployed)\n\n3 fixes:\n\n1. **`is_full` never set to 1 when `maxGroupSize` reduced to equal member count** (CRITICAL) — The PATCH handler only checked `< currentMemberCount` (reject) and `> currentMemberCount && is_full` (reopen), but missed the `=== currentMemberCount` case. When an author reduced group size to exactly the current count, `is_full` stayed 0, leaving the listing visible in browse and appearing joinable. Added the missing equality branch.\n\n2. **Transaction mutates outer `updates`/`values` arrays** (CRITICAL) — The `updates` and `values` arrays were declared outside the `db.transaction()` closure but mutated inside it via `.push()`. Structurally unsafe — any retry or double-call would corrupt the SQL with duplicate bindings. Fixed by creating local copies (`txUpdates`/`txValues`) inside the transaction.\n\n3. **Users permanently locked out when `requires_approval` toggled off** (IMPORTANT) — When an author toggled `requires_approval` from true to false, users with pending applications became stuck: invisible to the author (gated by `requires_approval` check), blocked from direct join (pending app check), and blocked from re-apply (flag check). Fixed by auto-rejecting pending applications in the PATCH transaction when `requires_approval` is toggled off, and showing pending applicants to the author regardless of the flag.\n\nAll 201 tests pass (3 new), ESLint clean, build clean, CI green.\n\n## Also Noted (not fixed this round)\n- `notifyGroupFull` reads `platform_preference` outside the join transaction\n- `BOT_TOKEN` / `CLIENT_ID` captured at module load time\n- No `ON DELETE CASCADE` on FK constraints\n- `requireAuth` does not re-validate user existence in DB (low risk — no admin deletion UI)\n\n## Issues Monitored\n- **#54 (PAT expiry)**: Critical — needs-human\n- **#21 (Telegram token)**: Still needs-human\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. Check production health\n2. Monitor PAT expiry (#54) — critical\n3. Consider E2E testing, performance improvements, or new feature proposals\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

Here's what I did:\n\n## Session Summary — 2026-03-24 10:00 UTC\n\n**Code review round 13** — found and fixed 3 bugs:\n\n1. **CRITICAL: `is_full` gap** — When reducing `maxGroupSize` to exactly the current member count, `is_full` stayed at 0. The listing remained visible in browse and appeared joinable. Added the missing `=== currentMemberCount` branch.\n\n2. **CRITICAL: Transaction array mutation** — The PATCH transaction mutated outer `updates`/`values` arrays via `.push()` inside the closure. Fixed by using local copies inside the transaction.\n\n3. **IMPORTANT: Orphaned applications** — Users with pending applications became permanently locked out when `requires_approval` was toggled off. Fixed by auto-rejecting pending apps on toggle-off and showing pending applicants to the author regardless of the flag.\n\n**PR #101** — merged, deployed, production healthy (HTTP 200). 201 tests pass (3 new)."}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":292,"cache_read_input_tokens":55627,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":292},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"157c1bc9-ab32-4587-b8cf-8c8afacd8f33","uuid":"a8642fda-199d-4832-a50d-351a2a8e1023"}

Here's what I did:\n\n## Session Summary — 2026-03-24 10:00 UTC\n\n**Code review round 13** — found and fixed 3 bugs:\n\n1. **CRITICAL: `is_full` gap** — When reducing `maxGroupSize` to exactly the current member count, `is_full` stayed at 0. The listing remained visible in browse and appeared joinable. Added the missing `=== currentMemberCount` branch.\n\n2. **CRITICAL: Transaction array mutation** — The PATCH transaction mutated outer `updates`/`values` arrays via `.push()` inside the closure. Fixed by using local copies inside the transaction.\n\n3. **IMPORTANT: Orphaned applications** — Users with pending applications became permanently locked out when `requires_approval` was toggled off.
